review_text:
Victor war ein sehr netter Gastgeber, er hat immer auf Fragen reagiert, der Check-In lief einwandfrei. Auch die Unterkunft war wie beschrieben und wir haben uns sofort wohl gefühlt. Victor hat uns auch ein paar Empfehlungen dagelassen und hat sich immer um uns gekümmert und war immer für Fragen zu haben. Gerne wieder! Nice stay.
Easy to find.
Beautiful delicated living room!
Love it! The apartment of Victor was beautiful, well equipped and had very good vibes. We immediately felt like home. The area was very nice and quiet, but within some minutes to go you reached the tram.
For people who prefer Airbnbs on a higher level this is the place to stay.
Thanks Victor for sharing this beautiful place with us. We definitely recommend your place! Victor’s place was wonderful. It was beautifully decorated and we felt very at home. The terrace was a nice place to spend the evening.
We would highly recommend this place. Thank you

WOW 🤩…what a place. As others have said, pictures can’t capture the vibe and true beauty of this place. A fully renovated boat house in the Amstel river! We were traveling with two teenagers and everyone ranked this stay at the top of their vacation experience.
Sandra is an exceptional host. We had tons of fun paddle boarding and jumping into the impeccable waters of the river. Although we were close to restaurants and shops, it felt a world away from touristy Amsterdam. Even our neighbors were amazing and made us feel like locals. Honestly, one of the best stays ever. If you are looking for an experience out of the ordinary, don’t hesitate to book this place. Boendet är värt att spendera lite tid i. Det är kul att bara sitta och titta på all båttrafik som passerar. 素晴らしい滞在となりました。
必要なものは全て揃っています。
何よりダイニングルームからの眺めが素晴らしく、日暮れから夜中までゆったりと贅沢な時間を過ごせました。
トラムの駅から歩いて5分くらいなので、どこに行くにも便利です。
アムステルダムはとても魅力的な街で、また戻って来たいと思います。
ありがとうございました！ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5/5
Staying on this houseboat in Amsterdam was one of the most unique and memorable experiences I’ve ever had. The location was perfect — peacefully tucked along the canal, yet close enough to easily reach the heart of the city. Waking up to the gentle movement of the water and watching the boats pass by from the deck was something special.
The space itself was clean, cozy, and well-designed with everything I needed for a comfortable stay. The host was welcoming, easy to communicate with, and provided great recommendations for local spots and restaurants nearby. It truly felt like a home away from home, but with that extra charm only a houseboat can offer.
If you’re looking for a stay in Amsterdam that’s a little different from the usual hotels or apartments, I highly recommend this place. I’ll definitely be booking here again the next time I’m in the city. Contact facile et agréable.
La péniche est juste formidable et dans cadre tellement paisible. Même un bouquet de fleur fraîche à l’arrivée.
Juste pour moi qui aime beaucoup cuisiner, il me manquait quelques accessoires en cuisine…
Le concierge a été très réactif et efficace sur nos petits tracas.
Merci pour ce bon séjour. Das Hausboot war toll. Die Lage auf der Amstel war super spannend ! Und trotzdem ruhig ! Jederzeit zu empfehlen. Wir waren sehr zufrieden…! A stunning way to see Amsterdam— watching boats and ducks and swans is a treat I won’t forget soon! Easy tram connections into downtown. Sandra’s place is truly beautiful. The living room is spacious and welcoming and flooded with light. The big widows face directly the Amstel and it’s a pleasure to spend time there. The rooms downstairs are comfortable and the bathroom pretty big. The neighbour is lively and very nice to wander around. Sandra had always been very responsive and helpful throughout the stay. I’d definitely go back The houseboat was amazing! Beautiful views.
Very spacious and comfortable.
Would definitely return. The houseboat was awesome! I hope to come back! The host was slow to respond, but always responded within a day. At check-in she connected me with her neighbors who were all helpful. The space was clean and had everything we needed. The view and space were incredible. The houseboat doesn't rock, my family slept great and really wants to come back!

Awesome place. Good people Quelle déception... Pire expérience à l'hôtel.
En dépit de sa très bonne localisation (proche centre, parcs et musées), nous avons été très déçus de notre séjour dans cet Hotel.
Sachez, avant de réserver cette chambre, qu'elle ne sera probablement pas celle que l'on vous donnera.
Nous avons d'abord été placés dans une chambre au rez-de-chaussée, les fenêtres donnant sur un trottoir relativement passant, et bruyant. La chambre était spacieuse et confortable, en revanche, nous n'avons quasiment pas pu dormir de la nuit à cause du bruit des voitures, des passants ivres, des camions poubelle et camions de livraison au petit matin. L'écran de la télévision était également cassé (grosse fissure et image dégradée). C'est pourquoi nous avons demandé à changer de chambre dès le deuxième soir...
Nous espérions être cette fois dans une chambre bien plus calme, donnant peut-être sur la cour intérieur de l'hôtel. Malheureusement, la chambre mise à disposition se trouvait plus haut mais toujours sur rue.
Cette fois, deux voisins de chambre extrêmement bruyants toute la nuit... musique rap à fond dans la chambre, allers et venues tout au long de la nuit, porte de chambre qui claque etc etc etc... une fois encore nous n'avons pas pu faire une bonne nuit de sommeil. Les chambres semblent très très mal insonorisées, mais surtout, les fenêtres donnant sur l'extérieur ne réduisent pas le bruit ! C'est simple, nous avions l'impression d'avoir constamment les fenêtre ouvertes tellement le bruit était fort.
De plus, cette nouvelle chambre était beaucoup moins spacieuse et moins bien équipée que la première.
Nous avons donc payé plus cher une chambre qui était affichée sans doute moins chère. Si au moins nous avions pu dormir...! Selon moi, la moindre des choses auraient été de proposer d'offrir un petit déjeuner.
La télévision, cette fois, ne s'allumait carrément pas, et après leur avoir signalé, on nous a juste répondu "c'est normal.". Aussi, un problème dans la douche avec du matériel cassé et pas réparé, comme promis avant notre départ.
Nous ne sommes franchement pas d'ordinaire difficiles, mais je trouve que les prestations de cette hôtel ne sont pas du tout à la hauteur du prix qu'il coûte.
Sincèrement, à fuir. Atmosphère lourde dans la chambre, aucune possibilité d'ouvrir et une fenêtre pour aérer We location is great ! Very close to the beautiful Vondelpark. The staff are very friendly and helpful. It is located in a beautiful, quiet street. Clean , sweet staff , windows didnt open something i dislike but hey cant have it all Robbery Absolutely recommended

Excelente tal cual lo publicado We had a great stay! The apartment is perfectly located — there's a supermarket right across the street, which made it super convenient to grab anything we needed. It's also just a short walk from the center of Amsterdam, so we could explore the city easily. The host was very friendly and responded instantly to any questions or issues we had. Highly recommend this place for a comfortable and hassle-free stay! Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans votre appartement, toute fois la vaisselle était vraiment un peu juste ! The apartment had everything we needed and was conveniently located. The hosts were very helpful with proving information. Centrally located, lovely little apartment with great dining and shopping options. The hosts are very friendly and provide local recommendations. Thank you! Great stay! The host met us on arrival and was incredibly welcoming, sharing helpful tips on local attractions and the best spots to eat. The place was clean, comfortable, and well-located. Would definitely stay again! 可爱的房东，安静舒适的房间，交通便利，推荐入住 Merci pour ce joli appartement! Près de tout et excellente communication. A nice place with clear instructions.
Checkin was a straight forward process and they told me good tips on where to go and not go to get the best experience and value for money. Super séjour dans ce logement ! Conforme aux photos et au descriptif de l’annonce. Tram, restaurant, bars à proximité. Au top

Carine's place is beautifully located, with great views of the park and lots of natural light through the day. The apartment is very tastefully designed, was clean and comfortable, and well furnished with everything from coffee machine to dishwasher! The neighborhood is safe, quiet and family-friendly, with easy access to Vondel Park, which I particularly appreciated.
Check-in was a breeze, Kobe and Eva were friendly and prompt with meeting me and getting me settled in; they were also very flexible with my non-standard check-in and check-out times, and I was surprised by their generosity. 10/10 I would definitely choose to stay here on my next visit to Amsterdam. Amazing location and super cool artist's loft. We loved it! Great communication with Eva & Kobe who manage the property. We had everything we needed and enjoyed the space immensely. Especially the hammock! Would stay here again. Close to restaurants, public transport, museums, parks...just wonderful. Thank you for such a great stay! Absolutely loved our time in this apartment. Location is a dream, next to Vondelpark and easy walking or tram to all things Amsterdam. It is on the 4th floor with bathroom on the 5th, so plenty of stairs to climb as is typical Dutch. :) Would gladly stay here again. Thank you Carine and team! Amazing place to stay! Would definitely stay again! A home away from home.
A fabulous location. We spent much time on the beautiful terrace overlooking the skyline and treetops.
We'd love to stay again. Prime location We really enjoyed our stay at Carine’s charming apartment. Perfect for Vondelpark! We had an amazing stay at Carine’s place! The location was great (definitely recommend Uncommon for brunch/coffee and their sister place across the street for evening wine/food) and the apartment itself was adorable. Also super close to transit stations and an easily walkable neighborhood in general close to the park. Loved the hammock and the porch and the bed was extremely comfortable. Lots of stairs to get up, but to be expected in Amsterdam and overall we found them easier than other Airbnbs that we stayed in during our time in the city. Carine was very responsive, flexible with us, and kind! Would definitely stay here again and would recommend to others considering this listing. Our stay in Amsterdam was wonderful, and truly enhanced by staying in Carine's beautiful apartment. It is bright, clean, airy and well-decorated. The balcony with a view of Vondelpark Park and the Rijksmuseum is an amazing place to start the day with a coffee. As is typical in Amsterdam, there are steep flights of steps to get up to the apartment and to the second floor of the penthouse, but worth it for the privacy and feeling of seclusion in the middle of the bustling city. Would recommend to anyone heading to AMS. Just as charming the second time!
Lindo departamento, con buena conectividad hacia el centro de Amsterdam y en un barrio muy tranquilo. Mauro es muy amable y responde rápidamente.

We had a great stay with Arne! He was helpful, flexible, and friendly. The house is set up nicely for hosting guests, with fancy appliances in the kitchen and bathroom that made the stay feel like a treat. The building is right next to a metro station, so the city center is an easy train ride away. Definitely would reccomend. Très bien accueilli !!
Merci pour le séjour We had an amazing stay at Arne's place. He is a great host, a gifted artist and helped us with everything. We received a warm welcome by Arne at his place, which is very close to public transport to reach the city center and the airport. The place was really clean and although it was located next to street relatively quiet. Arne is very friendly and proactively warned us that it was king's day as well as what to consider while travelling. We can highly recommend the stay! 😊 오후 11시쯤 늦게 체크인을 했는데도 친절하게 맞이해줬습니다. 집도 굉장히 깔끔한 편이고 무엇보다 교통이 편리해서 아주 만족했습니다 Disfrutamos mucho la estadía en casa de Arne, puntos extras al baño que tenía una ducha como de hotel!
Tenía todas las comodidades necesarias para una buena estadía excelente, muy limpio, Arne muy amable. recomendado. el transporte publico esta muy cerca Good Arne was a great host and was always responsive. The home was quiet and was easy to find thanks to the clear and detailed instructions on the listing. Arne is a really cool guy, also super responsive in the Airbnb chat which was really helpful. The place was very clean and comfortable. It is also very near supermarkets and public transport, so great to pick up groceries and also go to the city. Highly recommend overall, especially for comics and DnD fans.

Enorme Gastfreundschaft, sehr hilfsbereit, super Lage, Schlafzimmer im Keller. Bei Hitze sehr gut! Für 3 Leute optimal. Bei mehr als 3 Personen müssen dann die weiteren Personen auf einem Schlafsofa nächtigen. Nathalie’s house is in the quiet street but very close to the centre of Amsterdam.. A true cozy room of a family, and every thing is included. If we are back to Amsterdam we will definitely ask her for availability. Stunning family home! Beautifully furnished, very comfortable and a modern kitchen was great for preparing meals. It was the perfect space for the 4 of us on our short trip to Amsterdam. Ideal location and very accessible. We are familiar with Amsterdam and wanted to be close to transit and Albert Cuyp market. This place hit the mark. The living space for our family of 5 well. Only (small) concern is the bedrooms are downstairs which is a bit damp. This is clear in the listing but something to be aware of when considering staying here. My family of 4 loved staying in Nathalie’s home. It has a great layout, lots of natural light, lovely outdoor space, comfortable furniture and beds, and a well stocked kitchen. The neighborhood is fantastic and convenient to museums, great restaurants, and various public transportation options. Nathalie was communicative and friendly, and offered great recommendations! We’d stay there again in a heartbeat. This is an amazing place in an amazing location. Brilliant. We came here with our 3 year old and 5 year old. The location was brilliant for us. Quiet residential streets close to the museums and canals.
A lovely cafe just round the corner as well as restaurants close by. The garden at the house was great to relax in after a busy day.
I’d highly recommend this property. Perfect for a small family. Thank you very much, Nathalie, for the house. We rested very well, the area is very quiet, and with a tram, we could easily get to the city center. Nathalie also left us a guide of places to visit, coffee, and tea to drink. We would definitely stay at this house again. Natalie’s place is very charming and gave our family a great place to stay to visit the museums and centre. Wonderful home and lovely and responsive host! We felt right at home in the quiet but well located flat. Check in and out were seamless and the recommendation great! Would return and recommend - Thank you 🤍✨💕

if you can get the idea of staying in a converted bridge house you will find this stay very interesting. it is very noisy as unexpected as it located literally right beside the road the bridge and the river.
the interior design is very well thought out, is very interesting and also functional as well.
the only slight problem was the method to check-in was a bit problematic and we had to call SWEET up, luckily they still answer phone calls for emergency after office hour. it was sorted out very quick but it was quite a helpless moment standing there at the beginning.
highly recommended whatsoever anyway. Such a cool concept these brughuisjes! Very functional tiny-house-type feel inside, but a historic building with the backstory told in the nice book inside. Surprisingly good view over the river and to the historic bridge. You are sleeping right next to a traffic intersection, but the noise didn't bother us at all. Looking forward to staying in some other brughuisjes too! Wonderful little place for our first night in Amsterdam. This is a unique location in a great neighborhood and a wonderful experience for anyone wanting to try something new. Wonderful stay, excellent location for access to central Amsterdam, very cosy little space Great ! Unieke locatie om te overnachten, lawaai viel mee voor ons.
Jammer dat de bagage niet ergens dichterbij kon gestockeerd worden voor de check-in.
Snelle communicatie van onze host Super cute place to stay by the canal, walkable, close to tram to take into city center. Inside was clean and had fun games to play with a beautiful view. Being able to store our things in the hotel the exchange by central station was very convenient to continue exploring before checking in and after checking out. helpful staff, sticks out so easy to find, right on the river. check out the boats in the summer if you can Our stay in this bridge house was amazing. The app for entry was not working when we arrived which contributed some stress, but they were extremely quick to respond to my message and helped me get in right away. The place is quaint and very clean-- it was like a postcard with the windows open out onto the bridge and the water. One of the coolest stays I've had so far-- I would highly recommend. I wanted a memorable experience in Amsterdam and this delivered! Very easy to navigate with the tram/bus.
One thing to be aware of: this location is outside of the more touristy areas, so the establishments around are really for locals and only speak Dutch. Just know that going in :-) really unique booking! you won't find this everywhere.
it's a bit noisy but you will be provided earplugs which is really attentive :)
it's tiny, it's cute, it's comfortable, it's lovely

The boathouse was an absolute gem. The space, location and comfort was worth paying extra for and not being in the crowded city center. Do not be put off by not being in the direct city center. This was much better!!!
The time spent in the house was relaxing and comfortable, and included more than what we needed during our stay.
What a treat to have access to so much open and outdoor space, as well as having separate bathrooms and toilets.
In looking at other listings I was mindful of the stairs for my older mother, but this was no issue here for her to handle.
Nicole was very welcoming when we met in person, and quickly responsive in the app when needed.
If ever I return to Amsterdam I will not hesitate to request another booking. Excellent host! Amazing property! Words don’t do all the little details justice. Alles wie beschrieben und super easy House is beautiful and in a very convenient location - Nicole had a lot of great recommendations and helped us shape an awesome weekend. Couldn’t recommend booking here enough This is a very unique experience to stay in a houseboat on a canal in Amsterdam. The house has a lot of light and is in a quiet neighborhood but still walkable to city center. We really enjoyed sitting on the deck in the evenings. We walked everywhere and she does provide bike options but we are more comfortable walking. I would stay here again. Nicole’s house boat was absolutely beautiful
A very unique and cool place to stay with lots of light and space outside on the water
Fully stocked kitchen bedrooms
Comfortable and really lovely bedding
Lovely location in Jordaan
Bikes available to borrow
Everything you need was there and we would absolutely love to stay again! Nicole was very nice and accommodating. We enjoyed our stay Nuestra estadía en la casa de Nicole fue soñada.
Es una casa hermosa, en un lugar privilegiado.
La conexión con el agua y la buena enérgia de la casa hicieron que nuestra estadía fuese hermosa.
Realmente nos sentimos en casa.
Nicole es una excelente anfitriona, es pro activa a recomendarte consejos, estar a disposición por cualquier duda o necesidad que tengas.
Si queres disfrutar de Amsterdam lejos del ruido pero con rápido acceso al centro la casa de Nicole es ideal. Great place to stay away from the crowds. Nice open and airy on a beautiful canal. Such a cool spot. Nicole was always very responsive and welcoming. Very communal feel to the experience. Would stay again!

Sake’s place was very cozy with a great location! The only thing is that the blackout curtains had to stay closed the entire time and the bathroom was pretty small, making the space feel a little small and dark. However, the space was very clean and Sake was very helpful. We were able to fit three people comfortably. Would stay here again! Great stay. Perfect host. Only tiny thing is that the loft is quite close to the ceiling. But the bed itself is massive so it makes up for it. For reference If you’re 6 foot you can’t sit up on the bed fully wonderful, convenient, Very nice place, very comfortable and clean, so many great places around to walk to. We enjoyed staying there and would definitely recommend:) We had a great stay. It was easy to get to with public transportation and a unique space that felt very Amsterdam. Friendly host! Had a great stay! The space was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. Sake was a responsive and really helpful host, making check-in easy and the whole experience smooth. Would definitely stay again if we revisit Amsterdam! Wir hatten einen tollen Aufenthalt in Amsterdam. Die Wohnung war sauber, schön eingerichtet und es fehlte uns an nichts. Die Lage ist perfekt, mit Geschäften und Restaurants in unmittelbarer Nähe. Der Gastgeber war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Ich kann diese Unterkunft uneingeschränkt empfehlen und würde jederzeit wieder hier übernachten. Sake's place was in a quiet neighbourhood with very nice coffee options nearby, and it was very well connected to the rest of amsterdam via tram.
The place is small, especially the bathroom which was also very dimly lit. I'd recommend bringing flip flops for the bathroom as the wet-floor shower means it gets saturated when showering, and the squeegy doesn't fully get rid of the moisture on the floor. The bathroom also had a damp smell. Very tall people should consider that the ceiling in the loft is very low, I bumped my head a couple of times.
Tea, coffee, and musli were provided which was a nice touch. The location is wonderful and everything was as described. Sake is very responsive and gave wonderful recommendations around the area. The place was spotless and very clean.
Thanks again! Wir haben eine Außergewöhliche Unterkunft angetrofen.
Die Umgebebung ist ruihig und auf der Straße gibt es einige schöne Cafes, Restauaurantes und Einkaufsmöglichleiten.
Im "Art Cafe " gegeüner bekommt man eine fantastischen Kaffe.
Das Frühstück im " The Cottage" oberhalb der Straße ist sehr zu empfehlen.
Man muss nur früh das sein um einen guten Platz zu bekommen.
Zwei Strassen weiter kann man wunberschön in Bistros am Wasser sitzen
Sake , der Vermiter wohnt im selben Haus und ist ein sehr freundlicher und zuvorkommender Mensch.
Die Verkehrsanbindung zu Innenstadt ist mit Bus und Bahn absolut perfekt!
Wir hatten eine wirklich gute Zeit in Amsterdan und kommen gerne wieder.

Otto’s studio rental is lovely! The studio was very clean and is in a great area with lots to do! Otto was very communicative and helpful. Would highly recommend! Having been to Amsterdam a few times to visit friends I can honestly say that this is the first time I'll likely book the same place again for future visits. Otto was welcoming and very responsive throughout our stay and was very accommodating when our check in time was going to be later than intended.
The bed was comfortable and spacious.
Location is just right.
Everything was clean.
10/10 would recommend. The apartment was roomy, clean and in order with all amenities as advertised. Access in/out was simple and convenient. There’s no better place to stay in Amsterdam. Easy walking to anyplace! Thanks Otto! Séjour parfait.
L’appartement est dans l’hypermarché centre à à côté du canal.
Tout le mobilier et le linge de maison est de très bonne qualité.
Cosy et de très bon goût.
Merci 🙏

Le logement proposé par Otto est parfait avec un emplacement idéal !
Otto est très serviable et il est facilement joignable ! L’appartement est très agréable et calme. L’emplacement excellent, au centre-ville près de la gare et du métro.
La communication avec Otto est très bonne. Il nous a très bien accueillie pour faire le tour du logement.
Je recommande cet appartement Notre séjour chez Otto était parfait ! Le logement est très bien placé, très central pour visiter Amsterdam à Pied.
Le logement est spacieux, fonctionnel, lumineux et calme.
Très bonne communication avec Otto qui est très réactif et arrangeant.
Nous reviendrons avec plaisir :) ! Thank you for a great stay Otto. We will definitely come back soon! 10/10 Otto’s place is in a perfect location in the city. I stayed there with my family of 4 and felt quite comfortable. I would recommend this place if you want to be near everything with 4 or less people: Had a truly wonderful stay at Otto’s for my birthday weekend. The flat is lovely, well kept and clean. Perfect location, very short walk from lots of lovely shops, bars and restaurants. Loved sitting on the balcony having my morning coffee watching the world go by. Otto was a perfect host… kept in touch, quick to respond and gave us some great recommendations for places to visit. Also came to introduce himself on our first day. Was lovely meeting you, we will be back!! Thank you. Great location and smooth check in support. Cleanliness was a major issue. Garbages weren’t changed, fruit flies everywhere in kitchen and bathroom, crusty stained bedroom sheet so couldn’t sleep in bed, closet with the washing machine was full of clothes and a garbage bag full of empty beer and liquor bottles, owners piles of clothing on other bedroom floor. Wifi wasn’t connected and remote required us to buy batteries. Besides location, wasn’t a positive experience. Ho avuto il piacere di soggiornare in questo appartamento nel centro di Amsterdam, e non posso che consigliarlo a chiunque cerchi un'esperienza autentica e confortevole in questa meravigliosa città. L'appartamento è spazioso e luminoso ed offre la possibilità di esplorare Amsterdam comodamente a piedi. La cucina è ben attrezzata e mi ha permesso di preparare qualche pasto comodamente. Il check-in e il check-out sono stati semplici e puntuali grazie alla gentilezza e alla professionalità del proprietario.L'unica piccola mancanza è l’assenza di luci da comodino. Se amate leggere la sera, vi consiglio di attrezzarvi con una lampada frontale, per il resto lo consiglio vivamente! Beautiful view from the balcony , close to many shops and restaurants! Apartmán byl přímo v centru města. Ke všem památkám to bylo blízko i pěšky. Výhled na historický kostel byl úžasný. V noci byl klid a ticho.

We had a very comfortable stay in the apartment. Having a car parking space was a bonus. Nilko's apartment is stylish , well equipped and well located with options to visit good restaurants. Its very well placed for shops and a supermarket. Easy access to public transportation for sights.
Nilko was an excellent host . Very friendly and flexible. She let us check out at a later time when our lift to the airport got delayed. I would highly recommend Niko's apartment. I went for a 4 night trip with my family of 4 (my chidren are 3 and 5). I was very anxious about the cleanliness of the property before arrival (first time using air bnb and have heard some horror stories!!)
Upon arrival we were greeted by the smell of fresh linen, plumped pillows and an immaculate apartment. Everything about this place was just perfect. We were a 20 min bus ride away from the city centre, a 30 min trip from the beach with some great restaurants within walking distance.
Our host couldn’t have done more for us, she left instructions on how to use all appliances, things to do nearby and no shortage of anything!
A definite reason to go back having found such a great place to stay :) Beautiful apartment with every modern convenience. Great neighborhood, diverse with great restaurants of a variety of cuisines and walking distance to beautiful parks. Outside the chaos of central Amsterdam but very convenient to get anywhere by public transportation. Nilko’s apartment is lovely and comfortable and she was such a welcoming host, with plenty of recommendations, helpful instructions and very responsive to messages and questions. A wonderful stay! It was perfect for our family of four! This lovely apartment is exactly as stated with extra thoughtful touches like charging cords! Nilko was very responsive if we had a question or couldn’t find something. Beautiful view from the balcony. We were lucky that the weather was stunning and everything was blooming! Thank you for a wonderful stay! Beautiful flat and good place to stay when visiting Amsterdam, bunk beds are 50kg max should have been specified as we couldn’t use that room at all. Other than that great experience Our family had a great weekend in Amsterdam. The apartment was very easy to find and the parking was so handy. The apartment is very well located with restaurants and shops walking distance.
The kitchen is very well equipped and the decoration of the place is beautiful.
It was super easy to get to the city centre via public transport. The host was really welcoming and very responsive by text. I would definitely recommend this place for a visit of Amsterdam. très bel appartement.
Le centre ville très facilement accessible en bus ou tram.
grande place de parking en sous sol.
l'hôte est extrêmement sympathique

What a great stay in Jordaan! Loretta and Thomas were fantastic hosts. They kindly accommodated our request for an early check-in, provided great recommendations for things to do in the area, and kept lines of communication open for any questions that arose throughout our stay. The unit itself couldn't be better located -- right in the heart of the neighborhood, just a few blocks away from long stretches of shops, bars, and restaurants along the canals. It was very convenient for sightseeing (in close proximity to the city center and museum district), safe, and relaxing to come back to at the end of the day. Thank you, Loretta and Thomas, for such a lovely stay!
*Note: For folks with mobility concerns, the unit is split across three levels with a series of rather narrow spiral staircases. If that many stairs are a cause for concern, it may be best to find another place or reach out to the hosts with accessibility questions. We had a lovely time here. Excellent location and very clean! This home was absolutely amazing! Location location location, you couldn’t ask to be in a better location than this. There was easy access to the tram, food, and entertainment. The decor was great, it’s what caught my eye when choosing a place to book. Loretta and Thomas were both very responsive and flexible when I had an issue with my travel. Top notch hosts and property! Super!!! This stay was fantastic! The property was beautiful and Loretta and Thomas do a fantastic job at hosting and making sure you are comfortable and have a good time. 10/10!! Excellent location and the apartment had all we needed and was beautifully decorated making it a very comfortable experience. We would definitely return! Excellente prestation, mimi très sympathique, appartment bien décorer et bien équipé. On le recommande sans hésitation. Our stay at Mimi’s beautiful apartment was nothing short of magical! with and without luggage.
Mimi was so so welcoming and instantly made us feel comfortable. We couldn’t have asked for a better stay. If I could give it 6 stars out of 5, I would!

Our interaction with the hosts were friendly but we felt they were not forthcoming in their listing on some important considerations for guests. We made our reservation 7+ months in advance and 1 week before arrival we were sent a document with 1.5 pages of responsibilities associated with feeding/caring for their family pet. A prior review mentioned the cat, but the listing did not specify that the cat would be left in the home when rented. When this concern was raised to the hosts, they requested we cover the expenses of boarding the cat. AirBnB customer service intervened and resolved the issue; the hosts have now updated their listing to make it accurate. Second, the listing did not mention the 3 long & steep staircases inside the home which are unsafe for young children, challenging for even healthy adults & very difficult to manage with luggage. We don't consider this a family friendly home suitable for guests with young children.

Helaas was er deze keer verwarring over de parkeerontheffing langs de Provinciale Weg tegenover de ingang van de accommodatie. Daar wist de politie niets nu ineens niets van, dus de auto moest daar weg.

Volgens de gastheer is het een kastje-muur-verhaal tussen hem en de gemeente, maar het kostte mij wel bijna een flinke boete. This place is great! Its peaceful, quirky and beautifully decorated. The M53 metro from Central takes you to Gaasperplas station which is a lovely 15 minute walk to the air BnB through a park. There didn't appear to be many shops in walking distance of the AirBnB so we just purchased our bits in the city.

Breakfast was served at 9am every day. Which was a nice selection of cereals, bread, meats and cheeses. Tea and coffee was supplied (proper bean to cup coffee too!)
The place has a resident sheep! And two lovely cats. *Note if you are not a cat person, the cats do stroll into your room etc*. Por otro lado solo había dos botellas chiquitas de body wash y una de shampoo, para 2 personas durante 3 días. Y por ultimo, la ducha no tenia puerta por ende, cada vez que uno tomaba un baño, era cuestión de minutos para que se inunde todo el resto del baño.
Obviamente me comunique con Duko, quien tardo mucho en contestar y no resolvió ningun problema. Le hable también a un numero de celular que había proporcionado en uno de sus mensajes y la única respuesta a todo lo que le escribí fue "HOLA".
Considero que un alojamiento que no es para nada económico, debería proporcionar lo básico.

Al día siguiente expusimos el caso y la solución de los anfitriones fue llevarnos un purificador de ambiente y una cobija extra, pero ya era muy tarde porque mi pareja y yo nos enfermamos debido al olor. This Airbnb is a no-frills, budget-friendly stay - good if you’re just looking for a basic place to sleep. It’s not cozy or hotel-like, but it offers the essentials: a bed with linen, a blanket, and space to rest.
Be aware that access involves long steep stairs, so it’s not ideal for elderly guests or heavy luggage. The building is old, and the windows can be a bit tricky.
There’s no fan or AC, but the weather during my stay made it manageable. You’ll need to bring personal essentials, as the place isn’t fully stocked.
On the plus side, it has great connectivity to the city center and nearby shops, which is super convenient. A decent stay if you’re on a budget and plan to spend most of your time out and about.

Great stay and host was very helpful! Appartement d'une belle grandeur avec deux chambres fermées. Parfait pour une famille avec un ou 2 enfants. דניאל וסלסט אפשרו לנו גם צ'ק אין וגם צ'ק אאוט לפי הנוחות שלנו (צ'ק אין מוקדם בבוקר יום ראשון וצ'ק אאוט מאוחר לפי שעת הרכבת לטיסה),
כשהגענו פגשה אותנו אישית אחות של דניאל לתת לנו מפתח, וכיון שהיתה בעייה טכנית, מיד פנו לטפל בה. היא לא עזבה אותנו לרגע, דאגה ונשארה איתנו עד שנפתרה הבעיה (במהרה).
התקשורת עם סלסט, לפני הכניסה לדירה היתה מהירה ונוחה, וגם דאגו לנו לפתרון למיטת תינוק, שהיתה קריטית לשהות שלנו.
הנוחות שלנו באמסטרדם היתה מירבית, הודות למיקום הדירה ולנוחות שהדירה מציעה, בלי להכיר אותנו, סלסט ודניאל פתחו בפנינו את ביתם ואפשרו לנו להרגיש בבית גם רחוק מהבית.

Was gut zu wissen gewesen wäre: Es gibt – abgesehen von einem kleinen Kippfenster in der Küche – kein Fenster im Wohn-/Ess-/Schlafbereich. Man kann daher nicht richtig lüften, und es wird schnell stickig und warm. In den beiden Schlafzimmern lassen sich die Fenster jedoch öffnen.
Außerdem war der Esstisch stark verschmutzt und klebrig, was das Essen bzw. Sitzen dort unangenehm machte.
Zweimal wurde zudem durch andere Bewohner die Brandmeldeanlage ausgelöst – einmal mittags und einmal um 6:30 Uhr morgens. Jedes Mal dauerte es über 30 Minuten, bis der Alarm verstummte.

Lastly after being shocked at the state of the apartment we noticed that the apartment was completely different than the photos. We raised a complaint with the apartment owner since air bnb essentially said we can give you your money back and you can go back to the streets to find somewhere else to stay in our 3 day trip. The company in charge promised to send cleaners and give us our first night for free (25% refund) after sending a video proof of everything. I highly recommend this Airbnb! The host was patient and responsive. The place was beautiful and suited my needs perfectly! It was extremely clean and an excellent location. I felt comfortable, safe, and very much enjoyed my time in the space. It exceeded my expectations and was one of the best decisions I made in regards to my trip to Amsterdam! It was a great stay, the location is perfect. Beautiful canal outside. I really loved it. It’s such a cute and cozy place. We had a great stay. The location is really nice and the bed was super comfortable. The only issue we had with our stay is that the shower temperature is hard to control, the main issue however is that there is no door and the water floods the whole bathroom with use (also the water smells kinda bad for some reason), but this is all easily overlooked due to the incredible comfort and coziness afforded by this charming little room. Perfect location, you can be very close to many attractions like 10 minutes walk walk to train station and down town, however, it’s still a quiet and nice district without so much noise and crowd. The apartment is very good and stylish. Daniel and his team were very helpful since the beginning and very responsive. Definetly recommended! Great location! Great place to stay. Right in the heart of Amsterdam. Secure, quiet, clean, and a block away from the tram to get around Amsterdam. 市中心，步行可以到达很多景点，坐火车去周边小镇很方便。人也热情，会在公寓迎接你，咖啡很棒，推荐！ I stayed for just over two weeks. While I didn't deal with Daniel, I dealt with the co-hosts. They were clear with communication and when I encountered an issue when I arrived at midnight, they were available on the phone. They were also flexible when I needed to change start and end dates, and in providing me with a chopping board and knife that I required for my breakfasts. I think other reviewers might have commented on smells? It is a basement flat near the canal, and there might have been an odd smell occasionally from the bathroom, but nothing that inhibited the stay.
There isn't a kitchen (as the description mentioned), but there is a microwave, kettle and sink, and small fridge, so I was able to do some small things for snacks and breakfast okay.
The welcome sign and chocolate were nice touch. This place is beautiful and cozy. The check in was smooth and Daniel was wonderful to talk to! We enjoyed an excellent stay and thoroughly enjoyed our time there.
Daniel, Eva, and Kobe were very helpful, flexible and quick to respond at all times.
Perfect location for a couples trip. we stayed for a week and it is surrounded by amazing locations for meals, coffee and easy access to public transport and only a short walk to the city center.

One of our loveliest travel experiences ever. We spent several weeks on Arie & Gerte's wonderful boat watching the world float by. One of us gets very motion sick, but there was never a problem -- the boat is so stable. The boat was very comfortable (and large than our apartment back home in California), the neighborhood was wonderful -- we spent a lot of time walking/running east to Entrepotdok and Oosterpark and even though the boat is close to the Central Station, it is away from the big noisy tourist areas. Arie was very helpful with all our questions and we felt like we were welcome guests in his home. Airbnb doesn't get any better than this. Thanks again! Absolutely a quintessential Amsterdam experience! Beautiful houseboat on a picturesque and quiet canal. Easy walking distance to everything and the space of the houseboat exceeds everything you will find in an apartment. Had all the amenities we needed for a long stay! Would absolutely recommend to anyone Wife and I stayed here as part of a trip celebrating 40 years of marriage. We visited Barcelona, Cartegena, Ceatu, Lisbon, Le Havre, and the Norwegian Fjords - this little treasure in Amsterdam was a highlight of the trip. Arie was a superb host; communicating with us in advance, meeting us early when we arrived, offering local recommendations and always available if needed.
The boat itself is unique with a design that allows guests to sit comfortably at the kitchen table with open window that makes you feel as if you are the king/queen of the canals as the boats go by. The boat has a very comfortable bedroom and living room area but sitting at the kitchen table is what we will always remember. The canal is wide and busy yet quiet. Full kitchen available as well as full bath, separate shower and laundry facilities.
The location is quiet and peaceful yet central to almost everything, we walked to all of the main attractions in Amsterdam from this central location.
Awesome! Arie’s boat was the best part of our trip to Amsterdam. Great location, wonderful interior, relaxing, made us feel like locals!
We 100% recommend this site to anyone who might be looking for a place to stay in Amsterdam . This was one of the best airbnb stays we've ever enjoyed. The houseboat was just beautiful and the location could not have been better. Add all the little details the hosts had thought of, and their friendly and responsive attitude, we could not have asked for a better stay in Amsterdam. Thank you Arie and Gerda for something very special. What a perfect stay for a visit to Amsterdam! This is a very special place. The houseboat is spacious and comfortable, and the hosts are exceptionally welcoming and helpful. Location is near to everything (metro and restaurants and groceries), but not too busy. Nights were quiet, mornings you could hear all the birds singing in the trees over the canal. Very relaxing to linger over breakfast and watch the tour boats drift by. Felt like we were locals. Thank you Arie and Gerda for sharing your beautiful boat with us! Aries houseboat is fantastic, it is the second time we have stayed and it’s been the most memorable part of our European vacation This was an incredibly authentic way to experience Amsterdam. Arie was extremely responsive greeting us at arrival, providing history and a tour of the boat along with local suggestions. There was plenty of room for 2 people, the shower temp and pressure were amazing. The best view of the home was the kitchen where we spent the early morning and evening viewing the canal through large sliding windows watching the tour boats, birds and people go by. Although we didn’t cook the kitchen had all the basics you would need. You are also very close to the supermarket and trains. Many of the attractions were a convenient 20 minute walk. The location was safe and quiet. Can’t wait to return. We have stayed at 37+ AirBnB locations and a week on Arie’s large refurbished houseboat on a canal in the Nieuwmarkt area of Amsterdam was our favorite. Arie met us at the boat and had coffee and pastries for us. We set at the table in the kitchen and watched canal traffic as he oriented us to the boat and neighborhood. The 90-foot boat is in a quiet area with nearby Italian (il Sogno- great pizza), Japanese gastropub, Thai restaurants and coffee cafes, a Metro station two blocks away, and within walking distance of the Amsterdam Centraal train station and museums as well as grocery stores, etc. Nieuwmarkt square has a Saturday farmer’s market with vendors highlighting local produce, cheeses, meat and smoked fish, besides the local “haaring/herring”. At night, the neighborhood was extremely quiet and safe. We enjoyed spreading out after staying in hotels for the previous 2 weeks. It was wonderful to have a full kitchen with dishwasher, living room, washer/dryer, full bathroom. Arie hat uns freundlich empfangen und uns alles gezeigt auf dem Boot.
Er hat uns sogar Essen fürs Frühstück in den Kühlschrank gelegt.Auch Getränke und Wein hat er bereit gestellt.
Der Aufenthalt auf dem Boot hat uns sehr gefallen! Wir würden jederzeit wieder kommen.

Hébergement très pratique et abordable pour un court séjour à Amsterdam.

Responsive and easy communicate with Super lieu très au calme dans un super quartier. N,hésitez pas ! 4 goods size rooms, very quiet at night. Nice modern house by Amstel river - lots of stairs. Good place to stay when attending RAI conference. This was a fabulous experience. Wouter was very helpful. Communication with him was great. The apartment was close to my conference site, however it is only 10-15 minutes downtown by bus or tram. Wouter is a nice guy, easy to get on with, and always ready to help. Had a lovely stay at Wouters Apartment. It is so comfortable, relaxing and really modern with everything you need! We highly recommend this space for your trip to Amsterdam. wouter was a great and friendly host. he communicated well and was very helpful. his place is exactly like the pictures and the roof terrace was so nice to have. Best trip. Loved the area.

Was very easy to get to on the tram from the train station, beautiful area and a lovely little park, cafe and shop about 10 mins from the air b and b.
The room was perfect, warm, cosy and really nice to have the garden x Wir hatten einen sehr schönen Aufenthalt – alles war genauso wie beschrieben! Die Unterkunft war sauber, gut ausgestattet und sehr gemütlich. Die Kommunikation war super freundlich und unkompliziert. Wir haben uns rundum wohlgefühlt und kommen gerne wieder. Vielen Dank! We had a great stay here and Erwin was very nice and accomodating! We would definitely recommend this place if you plan on visiting Amsterdam. Erwin was a great host. He is informative and always tries to help where he can. The place feels cozy with all the basic necessities. It is also within walking distance to public transportation to get you around Amsterdam. Highly recommend for both long and short trips! First of all, Erwin is a very nice guy and an awesome host. Made sure we were all set up after check in and even offered up some recommendations for places to visit. His apartment was very stylish. The pictures don’t actually do it justice. Tucked away in a quiet area but just a short 5-7 min walk to all the action. Would definitely stay here again. I'm traveling with Airbnb for about 6-7 years and this is the first time I'm writing a negative review.
Overall Erwin's flat looks nice and cozy. Good location, nice design, first floor. But it is bad when it comes to the details. It is as if you came to your teenage brother place for a couple of nights and he just cleaned up a little bit and wiped floors.
- bed linen smelled human, as if someone had been sleeping for 2-3 nights, not quite dirty, but not super clean either. Most likely it was not even the smell of dirty laundry, but pillows that had not been washed for some time.
- toilet inside was clean but we found some yellow spots on the seat. The shower faucet was dirty and we found welcoming used razor and pumice stone right here in the shower.
- the kitchen was ok, just the sink covered in oily something with crumbs and a bit more stuff.
- towels were clean but they were kinda wet like you just wiped after a shower.
It mostly felt more like couch surfing place, not Airbnb. So after 10 minutes there we grabbed our stuff and went to the hotel. In a week, we got a refund from Airbnb.

Beautiful place, perfect location and quick response time from a helpful host! Tom’s place was absolutely beautiful. Everything about the stay was perfect. I was in Amsterdam for 2 weeks and the apartment felt like home.

Thanks for a beautiful stay, when I’m back ill be staying again!! Had a great stay. Apartment was lovely and sunny. Super comfy bed, lovely kitchen and bathroom and lots of indoor plants. Tom provided a lot of recommendations and was very friendly and helpful. Would stay again. My boyfriend and I had such a wonderful few days at Tom’s place! The flat was spotless and had everything we needed, so we felt very much at home. Highly recommend and would definitely stay again! I’m a frequent user of Airbnb and this is by far the best place I have stayed! Do not hesitate to book this home if you are lucky enough to have it available for your dates. One of the best AirBnBs I’ve ever been in! Modern flat, clean and peaceful.
Great view and lovely neighbourhood.
Tom’s suggestions were really useful! It was a privilege to stay at Tom’s beautiful home. Tom felt more like a friend than a host. Absolutely everything was lovely, from the view to the gorgeous, village-like neighborhood. If you have the chance, you should book your stay here. Lovely apartment, excellent location and great hosts!
Would reccommend 5/5 Wonderful place, great atmosphere, helpful and friendly owner This is one of the best experiences we had on AirBnB.

Full amenities included for your use.

Mooie uitvalsbasis om Amsterdam te verkennen en je ook terug te kunnen trekken in een wat rustiger maar nog altijd sfeervolle omgeving nabij brouwerij ‘t ij.
Handige entree met pincode, snelle reactie bij vragen via de telefoon. Zeer ruime lockers voor spullen. Koffie en thee stond klaar. Zeker een aanrader. Great location, comfortable beds and convenient access.
The only downsides were the fact that I had requested an early check-in (around 11:30 am) and had to wait until close to 2pm to access our room. I couldn't leave my luggage since all of the lockers were full. Also, the stairs between the lower and upper levels of the unit were narrow and treacherous, particularly if one needs to climb down in the middle of the night to use the bathroom (I gripped the handrail tightly on each descent). I'm in my early 50s, but wouldn't feel comfortable in this unit as an older or more feeble person. Also, there was insufficient shelving for my clothes. We really enjoyed staying at this apartment and would absolutely do it again. The studio was clean, comfortable, warm and modern, and had everything necessary for cooking, coffee, tea and even a bit of olive oil. All aparments in the buidling are managed by a company called Numa. It was a bit confusing because I didn't know this when I did the booking and I had to do a external check-in with them outside the AirBnB app, but everything was fine. Even if there is not a physical reception, the Whatssap chat with Numa staff works very well (they even answered quickly after a fire alarm in the building during which all gests had to be evacuated at 11 pm. Don't worry, nothing bad happened, only aparently someone burned their food :)). There is a bus stop to the city center in front of the building and one for the tram a few minutes away. There are also two supermarkets and a few bars. Apart from that, the area is chill and in the building there are only touristic studios/aparments. Check in nicht 15 Uhr sondern 16.30 Uhr. Très bel hôtel avec une bonne localisation the place is neat and very nice. the location is excellent! the room was very small though and no comfortable seating. (only chairs, no sofa) Logement situé dans un très bel immeuble sécurisé, logement très propre, très calme, bien situé à 25 minutes à pied du centre ville et de la gare. On peut regretter qu’il n’y ait personne physiquement sur place, mais la communication via messagerie est vraiment très bien, très belle réactivité du service client, très bons échanges et dans la langue souhaitée. Un service de chauffeur pour les transferts à l’aéroport sont proposés à l’arrivée et au départ et c’est un vrai plus. De même après le départ possibilité de laisser les bagages dans un meuble sécurisé pour profiter de la journée sans être encombré par les valises. Nous recommandons vivement. I was in Amsterdam for an extended stay, and this apartment/hotel was the perfect spot. I definitely recommend!

We had a lovely stay! Yes, there are the steps … but worth the climb! The place was just as described. We ate at several of the local recommended places. Such a lovely stay in Amsterdam at Steven’s apartment! Perfect location to explore the city by foot, beautiful apartment and easy communication. Only downside perhaps were the slow responses to check in procedure with code to the key safe only known to me 20min prior my arrival at the space in the afternoon which added to the suspense “will i actually be able to drop my luggage”. Overall would stay again - good location, clean and good value. Location is amazing. I walked everywhere. Not to mention some of the best food in A’dam is literally around the corner.

Location is amazing! Sehr schöne Unterkunft in sehr ruhiger Straße und trotzdem inmitten einer schönen Gegend mit Cafés und Restaurants. The apartment was cozy and we really enjoyed our stay there. The location was perfect (not too close to the crowded areas but close enough to easily get to places). Die Wohnung war ein top Ausgangspunkt, um Amsterdam zu erkunden! Zu Fuß geht man zwar ein Stückchen ins Zentrum, aber mit der Metro gleich ums Eck ist man sehr schnell drinnen.
Die Straße und die Gegend generell ist sehr ruhig und idyllisch. Auch die Wohnung war wirklich angenehm ruhig und es war sehr angenehm, dass der Check-in flexible war!
Lediglich, dass zweite Bett war nicht ganz ideal. Es war ein Schlafsofa, das von der Polsterung aber nicht so angenehm zum Schlafen war. Und das kein WLAN vorhanden war, aber das war auch so beschrieben.
Allem in allem aber eine sehr gut Unterkunft!

Pjotr’s place is GORGEOUS! Exactly like the photos, possibly better. The location was perfect… my partner and I just loved to walk the neighborhood and explore every charming street and canal. Next door is a Michelin-starred restaurant, 101 Gowrie, that was one of our top 5 meals of all-time!! We loved everything about our stay! And Pjotr was the consummate host! I have had several AirBnBs in the lovely De Pijp neighborhood of Amsterdam, this place was by far the best. Superbe logement, très cosy et confortable.
On a particulièrement apprécié de trouver le fond d'épicerie utile pour cuisiner pendant notre court séjour.
Bon emplacement à proximité du marché, de nombreux restaurants, et à deuxpas du quartier des musées. החופשה בדירתו של פיורט הייתה חלומית. הדירה יפיפיה, נראית טוב הרבה יותר במציאות, מרווחת, נעימה, ונותנת תחושה "מקומית". הרגשנו כמו תושבי אמסטרדם :) פיורט היה מאוד נחמד והציע לנו עזרה בכל מה ששאלנו. אנחנו נשמח מאוד לחזור לשם. תודה רבה לך פיורט על החויה.
The vacation at Pjotr's apartment was dreamy. The apartment is beautiful, looks much better in reality, spacious, pleasant, and gives a "local" feeling. We felt like Amsterdam residents :) Pjotr was very nice and offered us help in everything we asked. We will be very happy to go back there. Thank you very much Pjotr for the experience. Spacious living space and bedroom. Nice to have 2 bathrooms and balcony. Easy access to dining places and tram. Lots of stairs which was fine for us but if you are not able it wouldn't be the place for you. Really lovely apartment, lots of daylight and spacious rooms. Great location with easy access to public transport. Would definitely book again. It was a great location and a lovely space. The windows were big and bright and let in lots of light. Our stay in Amsterdam was fantastic, thanks to Pjotr and his amazing apartment in the Pijp neighborhood! The moment we walked in, we were greeted by a bright and inviting living room that offered a lovely view of our street. It's clear that our hosts put a lot of love and thought into updating and furnishing the space.
The apartment was well furnished, featuring a large kitchen and dining area, which made it easy for us to bring back delicious food from the market (which was just a block away) and enjoy homemade dinners. The spacious room on the top floor had plenty of drawer space for us to settle in comfortably.
We were also super close to a vibrant street filled with shops and restaurants, and Pjotr provided us with fantastic recommendations that we ended up visiting multiple times. A fun bonus was the a little rock garden hidden halfway up the long Dutch stairwell, perfect for a quick break during our climbs :)
Thank you Pjotr! What an incredible space, so wonderful to immerse yourself right into local life in a stylish, harmonious home. Great living areas, with two couches, large dining area and spacious bedroom. Everything is thoughtful and well equipped. Lovely sunny rooms and quiet as elevated well above the streets. Cute balcony overlooking rooftops is a welcome suntrap for reading.
The local area is perfect, pretty park, walk to great restaurants, cool cafes and easy travel to central (2 stops) with lovely canal walk to Rijksmuseum and vondelpark. So ideal. Pjotr is a responsive and thoughtful host. We will be back to stay again. This was a lovely place to stay!

We loved staying at Roos' apartment. Our family of four had plenty of room to sleep, read and relax. The location was perfect for our exploration of Amsterdam - close to the tram and walkable. De Hallen nearby was perfect for our family and we discovered many great restaurants nearby. We loved it! Thank you! We had a wonderful stay! The place was nicer than pictures, very clean and modern. The neighborhood was fantastic, with lots of good restaurants and supermarket close by. Roos was responsive and a gracious host. Will definately rent again! We had the perfect stay at Roos’s family home. Their flat is stunning, spacious and decorated with great taste.
Our host was really quick to answer everything we needed, check in & check out happened perfectly , with even a little personalized welcome surprise wich is a really pleasant detail!
The house was clean, spacious, perfectly organized to receive travelers. We especially liked the light and the plants of the appartment;)
The location is great , at 2 min from the tramway station which goes quickly to everywhere you need. You can find as well Supermarket/restaurant, down the street!
For those who likes walking, you can go to most of the places as well! It took us 15/30min to most of the things we visited.
Wish to everyone the stay that we had in this beautiful place! Treated with detail and perfectly located, we highly recommend it!
Will be comming back soon! The apartment looks exactly like the pictures but the pictures can't do the place justice...very spacious and open. Very unique floor plan. Very large kitchen and sitting spaces. The kitchen terrace and rooftop terrace are well worth it. We wound up ubering to the Dam Square area each day rather than the public transportation because it was cheaper, but very easy and quick. Roos was VERY responsive before the rental and during the rental. We had a couple very minor problems that were worked through almost immediately so the communication was excellent. This was out first visit to Amsterdam and we loved it. Great place to stay! L'appartement de Ross est vraiment agréable, parfaitement équipé et bien placé. Le tramway est au coin de la rue pour rejoindre les différents points d'intérêt de la ville. Idéal pour les familles avec enfants, attention cependant, car l'appartement est divisé en 3/4 niveaux, il y a donc beaucoup d'escaliers. Un appartement idéal pour passer un agréable moment à Amsterdam. Beautiful home, amazing location and absolutely wonderful host. Great and confortable house, lot of spaces and perfectly equipped for a family with kids. The location is perfect , close to everything , very nice area.
Communication and check in with Roos was very easy. He had a great time!. Rosa is a wonderful host and has the loveliest home! She was so kind and communicative. Her home is roomy, beautiful and near so many gems— including Vondelpark and some delicious bakeries. We would definitely stay here again! This apartment is amazing, and is exactly what it looks like in the photos. The neighborhood is one of the best in Amsterdam, with tons of places to eat. The private roof deck is a special added treat. The apartment is very clean and well appointed. Great for young families. Amazing apartment a short tram ride from the center of Amsterdam. Super-friendly and helpful. Made our trip to Amsterdam something special.
Really enjoyed my stay at Angelique's. Lovely apartment, easy to get around, and great responsive hosting from Angelique. Would definitely visit again.

Exceptipnal spacious house with a stylish and unique decor.
There is also an immense green garden that is still in development but already there is a beautiful terrace with a stylish and a very comfy outdoor lounge set.
Beds are also very comfortable.
Centrally located in a quiet street, but very popular area and everything is in walking distance.
Equipped kitchen which made us feel right at home.
Definitely will be staying here again and recommending this wonderful home! The house Wes perfect for us!
We came with our parents and our two babies, and we had everything we needed and more. The kitchen had everything, and the garden is beautiful. The location was a walk from everywhere, and lots of restaurants, fine food and street food. We highly recommend. Well appointed, tastefully renovated, light-filled home in a vibrant Amsterdam neighborhood. Extremely comfortable and suitable for multiple guests. Dennis is a gracious host.

L’host è stato disponibile e ha risposto ai messaggi rapidamente. Appena arrivati, la casa non era stata pulita, ma dopo averlo comunicato a Bas, ha provveduto subito ad inviare l’addetto alle pulizie.
La posizione è ok, in 20 minuti di tram si raggiunge il centro. La terrazza è top. A parte il disguido iniziale per la mancata pulizia, è andato tutto ok. Everything went as expected Wonderful place friendly people Friendly and responsive host, that helped me out with questions. Grocery store in walking distance from the apartment as well as a tram station that's very close by. Great view from the terrace and spacious apartment.
Would stay there again and can recommend it. Eine sehr gute Unterkunft in einer Top Lage. Die Dachterrasse ist ein wahrer Traum wollte da garnicht mehr weg.
Bas hat immer schnell geantwortet und konnte immer gut aushelfen.
komme gerne jederzeit wieder 😋😊 A great place to stay. Slightly further down frm Central but its ok since the tram is just few min walk frm the place.
Bas n his team is very responsive.
Recommended place to stay is Amsterdam We had a really wonderful time here, definitely recommend! The apartment so was much better in person than the photos showed. It is very spacious and uncluttered. The fully opening balcony doors in the front room make it very airy. The views from both front and rear are amazing. Beach views from bedroom and street/canal views from the living room. The kitchenette area is also spacious with all facilties you would expect. Plently of equipment to use, my girlfriend was especially impressed with the selection of cup sizes!!
Again, a spacious bedroom with large comfy bed and a little fmclock radio and nice view
Walk in shower room, big again, with a double sink. Also a utility room with washer and drier, very handy.
Located on the 6th floor the lift was fast and very helpful for luggage and getting up and down. Roof terrace is a very nice with loungers to chill on, again with great views. Tram stop right outside takes 20 mins to Central Station
The local area is quiet, but especially so at night
I would definitely stay here again Wir waren sehr enttäuscht und können diese Unterkunft leider nicht empfehlen. Kein Penthouse, sondern eine Wohnung eingereiht zwischen vielen anderen Wohnungen in der 6. Etage. Die Terrasse ist über das allgemeine Treppenhaus hinauf in die 7. Etage erreichbar und kann von allen genutzt werden. Die Wohnung war leider gar nicht sauber (Flecken, Krümmel, Haare, etc.) und die Qualität der Ausstattung mangelhaft. If you want to stay at Maxim’s place, prepare yourself to live under 24/7 surveillance, neighbours recording videos & fabricating stories,. The neighbours don’t want an air bnb around them so everyone’s waiting for one mistake & kaput!
This is definitely in no circumstances a home-away-home. I would like to forget this traumatic episode as soon as possible. Perfect stay. Would highly recommend El apartamento era muy cálido y especial y tenía de todo. Es la vivienda de Maxim y comparte generosamente todo lo que tiene. Adicionalmente, Michael, el coanfitrión, fue extraordinariamente able y nos ayudó en varias cosas que nos sucedieron durante nuestra estancia. Fue muy amable.
Si tuviera que indicar un único inconveniente sería que al ser la vivienda del anfitrión, tenía muy poco espacio para poner tus cosas, así que si vas por varios días o traer mucho equipaje vas a tener que dejar muchas cosas en la maleta.
Por lo demás, el lugar me pareció fantástico Absolutely wonderful hosts. We were met with Michael at check-in and check-out and provided us with lots of good information and suggestions.. the chocolates and prosecco (which sadly we didnt have time to drink) was bonus!! The place was very clean, spacious, lots of natural light and the location was great. Michael was easy going and always responded v quickly to our messages. We definitely hope to return. 😊 Maxim’s place was stunning and pristine. Checking in was super easy. We met Michael who let us in and gave us a full tour. The apartment itself was huge, clean, and in a great area. My husband was obsessed with their shower. The laundry unit was nice to have and easy to use. The bedroom was clean and the queen bed was so lovely to have as it’s what we are used to at home, versus most European airbnbs that have double beds. We were there during the week and not a weekend, and it was an active area, but quiet at night when sleeping. We rented bikes and were able to lock them up right outside. We didn’t mind the security cameras at all, and no neighbors bothered us. Overall, we were absolutely impressed with this airbnb and would love to stay again. Maxim and Michael are wonderful hosts! Comfortable compact apartment. Very clean. Great neighbourhood quiet and close to city centre. Comfortable bed. Would recommend. Stunning and clean apartment in fantastic location. Highly recommend! Fantastic stay! The home was beautiful, spotless, cozy, and exactly as described. The host was incredibly welcoming and responsive. Great location, close to everything. Would definitely stay here again! Séjour de rêve. Très joli appart, lumineux et confortable. Accueil 5 étoiles. L’emplacement est parfait, le quartier magnifique, très agréable, et apaisant, tout en restant assez proche du centre.
J’ai tout simplement adoré. Maxim and Michael were great host. We find the location very accessible to major attractions at the same time retaining the peacefulness we were seeking. I enjoyed having art pieces in the living and also there is an electric piano!

Air con did not work on our first night but it was fixed for the second. Communication was really easy. Good hotel Great Good price, close to everything. Really good I want to stay there when I go back to Amsterdam Gostamos muito Definitely the place that I’ll stay when I visit Amsterdam again !! Muy buenos los departamentos It was a fair experience given the cost. Parking is not free at their premises. As well, amenities and items provided were bare minimum compared to other hosts. The front desk staff are really nice and helpful, though.
The room itself is spacious, and bathroom is clean and spacious as well. Others have complained about temperature control etc. but that’s actually not an issue. It was quite comfortable and adjustable. Muito bem localizado. Tudo lindo e impecável. Foi uma ótima estadia, deu pra fazer tudo a pé, tudo muito perto. Gostei demais. Had a great stay at Cityden! The apartment was clean, comfortable, and exactly as described. The location was convenient, and check-in was smooth. Would definitely stay again.

Bien ubicado, muy fácil moverse. Lugar muy limpio y acogedor. Leonardo siempre muy pendiente de todo. Leonardo est très sympa. La communication a été facile et agréable avec lui. Le logement est proche du centre d’Amsterdam et facilement accessible avec le ferry gratuit. Pour être honnêtes, nous avons été un peu déçus de la taille du logement et donc du peu d’intimité que nous avons pu avoir. Il faut avoir en tête que Léonardo et son amie habitent sur place. La salle de bain/wc est vraiment très petite et elle est partagée avec eux donc pas super intime, même si la cohabitation s’est bien passée !! Airbnb was bussin Leonardo was a lovely person. Very easy to communicate with and very responsive. The bed was comfortable, the check-in to the property was smooth, and it was very flexible.
The room was a bit small, but I think compare to expensive prices in Amsterdam, it worth the money. A nossa estadia foi ótima, o Léo é muito simpático e hospitaleiro. Ele e a esposa foram ótimas companhias durante o período em que ficamos.
Localização muito boa, perto do metrô, balsa e mercado, tudo fácil acesso.
Altamente recomendável! Sehr schöne Unterkunft, nette Vermieter, gute Verkehrsanbindung Best place for a short stay. Leonardo is flexible, friendly and very quick in responding. The stay was very nice:) I had a good stay at Leos place. Host very responsive and friendly, gave some local reccomendations.
The place was clean and tidy, but relatively small, it's Amsterdam after all, so not a surprise as its indicated in the description. Since its located in the North, its a fun experience to take the ferry, and peaceful to sleep at night. Leonardo é um ótimo anfitrião. Sua experiência como guia turístico nos auxiliou muito em nossa estada em Amsterdã.

Piccolo albergo nel cuore del quartiere rosso. Posizione ideale per spostarsi in città sia a piedi che con i mezzi, a 10 Min a piedi dalla stazione centrale. Nonostante la vivacità del quartiere di notte si dorme senza essere disturbati.
Il personale è stato tutto molto gentile ed amichevole. Colazione soddisfacente. Soggiorno perfetto! Posizione molto centrale, camera spaziosa e pulita. Disponibilità e gentilezza dell'host, grazie mille Es war ein sehr schöner Aufenthalt bei euch!!
Ein kleines, sehr persönlich und äußerst nett geführtes Hotel.
Alles war sehr sauber und ordentlich.
Die Unterkunft liegt sehr zentral und dadurch sind alle Sehenswürdigkeiten gut zu Fuß zu erreichen.
Besonders möchten wir uns bei Klaus bedanken. Er war immer sehr freundlich und hat sich um alles gekümmert. In den sehr angenehmen Gesprächen hat er uns viele Tipps für unseren Aufenthalt in Amsterdam gegeben, so dass dieser für uns ein wirklich schönes Erlebnis war.
Vielen Dank und wir werden euch auf jeden Fall weiter empfehlen. those Dutch style stairs were a challenge! staff on site were so helpful even carrying luggage upstairs and down. This was a great experience. The staff were super friendly and everything was very clean and kept well. Very good location and breakfast. Accessibility not so good for children or older people, but just a detail. The wifi was working very well.
Recommended. Helt supert, kommer gjerne tilbake! This place was in the perfect location, with the most gracious host! We were greeted by Tony who took us through all of the amenities of the hotel and gave us recommendations for food and activities in the area! The room was clean, and it was the perfect location to be in the mix of everything in Amsterdam. It’s also steps from Amsterdam Central Station, so perfect for getting to and from the airport. Typical Dutch old house stairwell!! But staff looked all our luggage to our room. It may be a one star Hotel but it has 7 Star staff, hospitality and couldn’t have wanted better staff. The staff of Anco Hotel were so friendly and accommodating. The continental breakfast was so nice, the recommendations from Debbie and Markus were spot on. The location was so easy to walk to from the Centraal Station and to explore the city. Thank you so much!

Very nice, calm and enlightend place to stay. Pauline is a welcoming host, helpful and reactive. Definitely recommended L’appartamento è comodo al tram e ai mezzi pubblici. Vicino a supermercati e bar/caffetterie buonissime dove fare colazione. L’appartamento è piccolo ma pulito e grazioso, giusto per una coppia che vuole girare e scoprire Amsterdam.

Benjamin and his girlfriend were very hospitable, and we could always reach the host. The neighborhood has great restaurants and cafes that the host has recommended. The place looked just like it did in the photos, and it had a very comfortable bed, we felt right at home. Check-in and check-out both was super smooth. If I come to Amsterdam again, I would definitely love to stay here again. 💐 Benn y su novia fueron muy amables y estuvieron atentos a nuestras necesidades. El lugar está a 10min del centro de Amsterdam, muy bien conectado (a unas 2 cdras tienes una estación de tranvía), a 1/2 cuadra un mercado local en la calle con todo lo que necesitas. La casa de Ben es muy bonita, amplia, con todos los artículos que necesitas en la cocina, la habitación es grande y el baño estuvieron siempre muy limpios con todos artículos de limpieza que podrías necesitar. Definitivamente recomiendo la casa de Ben para hospedarte y si volvemos a Amsterdam, nos volveríamos a alojar aquí. Super logement
Très calme très propre
Un petit marché juste à côté et proche du tram
Merci beaucoup
Ben a été très réactif et accueillant
Merci beaucoup Amazing stay at Ben’s place! The house is absolutely gorgeous, with spot-on decor, an incredibly comfy bed, and a super modern bathroom, we truly loved everything.
Having your own private space with a bedroom, bathroom, and WC is a huge plus. Everything was spotless, and the entire place smelled so good, such a lovely detail!
Ben was super responsive and left us a thoughtful list of great local recommendations upon arrival, which we really appreciated.
Definitely one of the best Airbnb experiences I’ve ever had. Thank you!!

We enjoyed our stay overall but I found it stressful being responsible for a cat that we were not expecting! The place is spacious and is easy to get into Amsterdam on the bus which is close to the accommodation. Nice touch to have red wine left for us. It is a lived in house.
