Great Airbnb, very close to the heart of Amsterdam but without the hustle and bustle of the city center. The house is directly next to a big swimming pool and a charming park with a bar. The neighborhood is walkable, we had easy transportation to the city center.
The house is bright, clean and cosy and we enjoyed romantic breakfasts in the garden. The bed was comfortable, quiet area. The house was well stocked with all the necessities, they were so sweet to prepare wine and beer in the fridge for us. Jaap is very friendly, responsive and accommodating. He prepared all kinds of fun things and gave good recommendations where to go. Highly recommended! Le logement de Jaap est confortable, Jaap est très disponible pour répondre à vos demandes. Le parc à côté est idéal pour aller courir.

Departamento con una excelente ubicación, bien equipado, muy cómodo y una vista al canal hermosa! Wonderful location, apartment, and host Beautiful flat, perfect location, amazing host - the Airbnb trifecta!!
Jup was awesome - always there whenever we messaged. The location is in a charming neighborhood, quite a ways from the touristy hustle and bustle of the center. SOOOOO many wonderful food options just a short stroll away. Honestly, we couldn't have asked for a better place. Highly recommended! We had a blast here. If I come back to Amsterdam I would definitely try to book here again. I will also be recommending all of my friends stay here. In short: great place to stay.
More details: the apartment is very bright and extremely well equipped. Especially the dedicated work desk. It’s the best I’ve had in all of my history with Airbnb. The hosts are very nice and friendly and just nice people to be around likely. Bedroom is quiet and sheets were very soft. Apartment is very clean and has everything most people need. There is sonos and hue lights, making environment even more cozy. A very good coffee machine, fast internet connection. Nice view on the street and the canal. Even the neighbors in the building were all very nice to us. Two weeks passed by really fast and we were a bit sad to leave. Great place to stay in Amsterdam. 感谢Jup分享他的房子和他的生活，房子交通便利，门口就是GVB 直达中央车站等景点. 家里的设施一应俱全，环境也特别舒服.非常感谢屋主分享他的生活，厨具一应俱全，音响是Sonos环绕，灯具是飞利浦，非常棒的体验. We had a great stay at Jup’s place! Very comfortable, well appointed and very convenient to anywhere you want to get to in the city. Great local recommendations, as well. Highly recommend! Stayed at Jup and Jip's place in 6-7/2025, visiting from Melbourne, Australia.
They are amazing hosts, very responsive in their communications before the actual stay period, and did everything (and more) to ensure my stay in Amsterdam was smooth sailing, comfortable and positive. The accomodation is clean, has all modern amenities, and really conveniently close to everything of any note. Their recommendations for places to visit and dine at nearby is a must read !
Highly recommend their place for anyone looking to stay in Amsterdam in future.

Wonderful apartment in a cozy part of Oud-Zuid. The neighborhood is very quiet, yet everything you need — shops, restaurants, and public transport — is just a short walk away. The apartment is spacious and comfortable, with easy-to-control climate settings, which is especially nice if you're visiting in colder months. The kitchen is fully equipped, and both bedrooms have their own bathrooms. The private rooftop is a lovely bonus — great for breakfast or relaxing during the day. The hosts were always responsive and helpful, even after we checked out. Highly recommended! We spent a month here as a couple, great peaceful location, close to an Albert Heijn, with close public transport connections all around. The place itself is v spacious, albeit it’s a 4th floor walk-up which we were a bit surprised about but that’s normal in Amsterdam.

Gerben’s home was a last minute booking for us and we were beyond pleased with the experience. They were gracious to meet us at check in and provide a tour of everything we needed to know. The rest of the day was spent enjoying the great canal views and walking the nearby neighborhood. The attention to detail made the overnight comfortable and we would happily be repeat visitors. Gerben's house boat was the perfect way to kick off our trip to Amsterdam! It was such an amazingly designed and well thought out space. Plus we were able to walk to pretty much everything we wanted to including tourist attractions, delicious food, and cool bars. Gerben was a great host and even met us at the train station to walk with us to the boat! This is by far the best Airbnb I have ever booked or stayed at. Gerben and Albert were excellent hosts and were so kind and friendly! The houseboat looked even more extravagant than in the photos which I didn’t think was possible! I would 100% book again and cannot wait to be back in Amsterdam to stay here. Also the location was perfect, within the heart of Amsterdam with so many shops, restaurants, and bars nearby. Gerben bize karşı son derece nazik ve yardımseverdi. Tekne harikaydı ve çok memnun kaldık! Her yer tertemizdi. İletişimimiz çok iyiydi ve hızlı cevap verdi. Mutlaka tekrar geleceğiz! We had an amazing time in the houseboat !! gerben is a really nice host always very polite and easy to talk to , made us feel at home :)
would definitely stay there again! My husband and I had a great day at Gerben‘s place. The location was great and it was easy to find the boat, especially since he met us there. The house boat is newly renovated with lots of great features and is clean when you arrive. Would definitely recommend this place to anybody looking to stay in Amsterdam on a houseboat! My stay on the houseboat as Gerben’s guest was excellent. It is the perfect place to truly relax for a couple days, which was what I did. The boat is situated in a perfect part of town for easy access to everything. I loved walking the neighborhood. I also enjoyed sitting on the back deck in the afternoon (I had two beautifully sunny days) watching boats pass through the canal. Gerben was a wonderful host. I hope to come again. Very unique stay. You get to stay on a boat! A few things to note. It’s in a fairly high traffic area, so when on the top deck there are a lot of boats driving by in the canal. It’s not an issue, but there’s not much privacy. Another thing to note, you do not get the entire boat, you only get the front section. There are other guests on the boat as well.
Other than that, it’s perfect! Kitchen sauna comfy bed. Can’t complain! Great place and as described. Has a lot of extras that were useful during our stay. We loved the location. Our experience visiting Amsterdam while staying on a house boat was a great part of our trip. It was rainy weather and we escaped by enjoying the rain on the boat.
Waving at the passing boats and appreciating the serene environment made for a peace stay.
The bed is so comfortable, the shower sauna combo was definitely a favorite! I would highly recommend for those looking for an authentic Amsterdam experience.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Jan and Fleur's airbnb. There was excellent communication throughout the stay. They even let us start our stay early, because we had an early arrival. The location is great. It is near the tram, so transportation was no problem. Overall we were very comfortable here, and would recommend this airbnb to anyone visiting Amsterdam. Clean, spacious and a lovely outdoor area. The flat is located in a lovely neighbourhood with lots to do nearby. Jan’s place is located in a phenomenal neighborhood that is both quiet and also filled with many things to do. Jan gave us great recommendations based on our interests, and he responded quickly to every message. Absolutely recommend staying here! The neighborhood is beautiful and not too far out from the downtown area. Public transportation is nearby making any commutes even quicker. El espacio es muy agradable, tiene una vibra muy linda. Aprovecharia mejor el patio tan lindo que hay. Pude acceder un par de horas antes del horario establecido... muy conforme. Regresaria sin problemas all was great . just missing a stove to be able to cook something . otherwise all is great . sun is shining on the terrasse in the afternoon . top . thank you This was a great experience, both the air bnb and the location. Great stay. Extremely quiet location all day and night, yet a few minutes walk to the subway. A few good restaurants around the area. Spotless bnb when we arrived. Would happily stay again! Close to a hotel, where some of our party was staying.
Beautiful views of the Amstel river. Such a great find! The neighborhood is so quiet and walkable with great finds right around the corner. Super close to the metro.

Great place overall would definitely recommend. Angenehmer Check in, gute Ausstattung lovely flat! the perfect combination of not too far from the center and not too close, we stayed for a week Great apartment for a family trip. The place was in a perfect location -- just along the Amstel River, easy walking to the Metro, restaurants, and grocery. We know exactly where we would like to stay for our next visit to Amsterdam! L’appartement est superbement décoré, parfaitement équipé et très agréable à vivre. L’arrivée est fluide, tout est bien pensé.
Le quartier, au bord de la rivière Amstel, est agréable, calme, bien desservi et idéalement situé pour explorer la ville ou prendre la route. Petite note : on entend les passages dans la cage d’escalier au-dessus de la cuisine, mais cela ne nous a pas dérangés. Un grand merci à Arild.

Die Unterkunft war genau wie beschrieben – sauber, gemütlich und gut ausgestattet. Die Lage war ideal, und wir hatten alles, was wir brauchten. Wir haben uns sehr willkommen gefühlt und würden definitiv wiederkommen. Vielen Dank für die tolle Erfahrung Very nice recently renovated apartment with a luxury vibe. We loved our stay at Gaspars place. It’s a cosy apartment close to the city centre with two separate bedrooms and a spacious kitchen and living room equipped with everything you need. The communication with Gaspar was easy and he was always very helpful. Bare in mind that the apartment is located in an old building with a very steep staircase (which is typical here). Can highly recommend Gaspar’s Airbnb - approx 20 minute walk from Amsterdam Central station, or less than 10 minute bus journey approximately x €3:20 pp from the main train station. Beautiful (fully renovated) x2 bedroom apartment (double & king size) we also were given a double blow-up bed. Fantastic host- couldn’t have been more accommodating, kept in touch regularly before we travelled & greeted us when we arrived. Steep spiral steps up to the apartment (2 short flights- but typical of the area & would only be a problem if you have mobility issues). Views of the canal front & back & a small balcony off the main bedroom (seating for 2 & table) - views directly over the canal- we could see people swimming, paddle boarding. Very safe & quiet area. Supermarket, restaurants etc within 2-3 minute walk. Just perfect for a family. Thanks Gaspar. A bit far from center, but an easy tram ride to all major attractions from the stop nearby, I appreciated the quiet of the neighborhood, especially the canal views out back from the bedroom. The place was clean and as advertised, there was water, good coffee, and some welcome snacks we enjoyed. Larger than expected - plenty of space -in a relative sense, it is still Amsterdam- but we were uncrowded with the two bedrooms and a spacious living room and kitchen, also with a nice view on the canal. Best Airbnb we stayed at! Felt like home away from home. 10 min walk from the old town, which makes it perfect combination of close enough and far enough from crowds and noise.
Would definitely recommend and stay here again when we are back in Amsterdam. Thank you Gaspar! Es un piso con una ubicación inmejorable, en una zona tranquila y a 15 min andando al centro. Dispone de tiendas y supermercados cercanos y también de transporte público.
Es amplio, bien arreglado, con buenas vistas y en general confortable.
Cocina bien equipada (sartenes, ollas, cuchillos afilados, bandejas, etc.) aunque no exactamente como se ve en las fotos.
La 2a habitación es justa en tamaño para dos personas, con una cama que se abre y se hace doble, pero suficiente para pasar unos días.
En resumen, una muy buena experiencia para conocer y disfrutar la ciudad cómodamente.

Thijs, thanks for the lovely surroundings & the wine and the chocolate! everything was great
good location
nice apartment Great apartment, lovely and clean. Great host and very responsive and helpful. Only thing is walking from centre, if you don’t like walking allot don’t book. very kind and helpful host, beautiful loft with all comfort, only a few tram stations far from the city centre. thank you for hosting us. for us this top floor apartment was a great space to come back to after exploring Amsterdam.
located within easy walking distance to shops ect and some great places to eat/drink. De Pijp metro is also nearby wich has quick links to the whole city.

They felt a bit outdated, lacked enough gears for a smoother ride, and one seat required a tool to adjust, which we didn’t have. Also, the bikes were quite tall, which made them uncomfortable for my girlfriend. A little upgrade here would really improve the experience. Buen alojamiento, bien comunicado, lo mejor la gata que es muy cariñosa, y una buena proporción en cuanto calidad-precio.

I've stayed at Vincent and Marley's for a month. The location is very good - in a local residential neighbourhood but good transport links and restaurants. Vincent and Marley are friendly people. However, if you're sensitive to noise or an introvert, this might not be the place for you because although they tried, it's not a private space at all - people come and go, they have parties and activities at home (it's their home so you can't do anything), and overall they're quite loud and extroverted people. The only way to toilet is to pass through other places too. They've asked me with concern about why I stayed in the room so much, but that's just me being introverted and wanting to enjoy alone time. It was the Euros and of course they had several nights of yelling at football with a friend who has their key. Overall I felt a little bit confined and not fully considered, but if you're one who like to interact with hosts every day they're very friendly and talkative people. Vincent and Marley are very easy going and made me feel free to come in and go as I pleased. I appreciated that they were really open to me arriving home whenever even if super late. - lots of space in the house

Transit right out the front door, the park across the street is incredible, and there’s coffee and shops all within a few blocks. We would happily stay again. Thanks Deja!

This is a great listing in an incredible location. You are no more than a 20 minute walk from all the sights in Amsterdam and close to amazing food and bakeries. Väldigt fint boende! Tillmötesgående värd som försökte lösa problemet med att vi behövde vänta på incheckningen på grund av sent städ. Centralt boende och fantastiskt terrass! Apartmant was nicely decorated, clean and well equiped. The neighborhood is peaceful which is good for relaxing from the busy city center. Metro is 10 minutes away walking. Super appartement, nous avons été très ravi, je vous remercie encore !! Excelente departamento. Impecable limpieza y estado. Realmente por el estado del departamento, la limpieza, la ubicacion y la comunicacion con el anfitrion, resulta altamente recomendable su reserva. Tout s'est très bien passé chez Michiel.
Logement propre, spacieux et très bien situé avec un accès très simple au centre ville.
Michiel a très bien communiqué avec toutes les informations données en amont.
Nous recommandons. We stayed at Michiel's place for 3 nights and loved the apartment and the location. A ten minute walked got us to the Metro and the ride to the center of town was about 15 minutes. Michiel was very responsive to our questions and gave us excellent answers. Appreciated the 1.5 baths, meaning, one bathroom had toilet and sink and the other had shower, tub and sink. If you plan on watching tv, you will need to download chromecast, but why watch tv when you can enjoy Amsterdam. Nice outside patio too. We would definitely stay there again. Loved be a bit outside the historical area especially since we were there during Kings Dat, but close enough to hop on public transit and be there in a few minutes. Lidl was 750 steps away for groceries.
The bathroom was the best part of the stay! After walking miles and miles each day sight seeing a hot soak was a WIN! FYI there’s a safety button on the water handles that allows the HOT! Water to flow, and I mean HOT!
Only suggestion I have would be possibly adding English instructions for the washer/dryer combo. Was very nice to pack light and have this nice amenity!

Un endroit très sympa, dans un super quartier. Michiel a été très disponible. Hautement recommandé ! Wonderful stay by the canal, easy enough to get to all the major public transportation lines and we liked the neighborhood. can't wait to come back!

Muy lindo alojamiento y Emil muy amable. L’appartement était conforme à la description. La chambre était spacieuse et confortable.
Le logement est très bien situé (tram et bus vers le centre, voir à pied 30 min du quartier Jordaan). Nous avons passé un très bon séjour chez Emil. Merci ! Emil was very friendly, the apartment was very clean and there is a division between the kitchen, the bedroom and rest of the flat that makes you feel you have the full house for yourself

La ubicación del Airbnb es excelente, pues todo está a minutos caminando, te quedarías en el centro literal. Mi familia y yo no hicimos uso del transporte, recorrimos los alrededores y el centro de la ciudad caminando. Como dato importante faltó un poco de limpieza en el lugar y muebles. Amazing place and was perfect for my first time traveling abroad! The apartment was not as clean or kept up as one would hope. The flooring is delaminating and there are large cracks between the floor boards. Space had not been cleaned by check in time, and toilet was not well cleaned at all. Shower curtain was disgusting and should be replaced. Towels were very small, thin and holey. Location is fabulous, and there is a large wonderful window to interior courtyard. Jorit is very responsive.

-no dedicated work space, which is listed in posting Great location. Easy to get to Metro or tram. Several great restaurants in the neighborhood. Lugares espectacular, lástima que queda en un 5 piso hay que subir muchas escaleras si sufren de asma como yo será un problema, pero en el apartamento es hermoso tiene Buena Vista, es fácil llegar a supermercados tiendas, entre otras. Pero la misma que la filtrado nunca estuvo al tanto y nunca respondió mis mensajes Location was excellent. City construction is currently making it a bit tough to navigate. That’ll be resolved when road work is done While the location is excellent for my needs there is little else that worked well for the apartment. The sofa cushions (bed) would not stay together so sleep was very uncomfortable. Sheets were to small for the cushions and were loose as soon as you laid down. Piles of dust were in the corners of the bedroom and a layer was under the bed activating my allergies. Going up the stairs, there was dust and debris all the way up - I know it is a shared space but important for those with allergies who are climbing around 80 steps.
Traveling for ten days and staying here for about that long I needed to do laundry. I couldn't find the drying rack and asked about it. I never got a reply. A few days later I found it behind the ironing board but never found an iron.
The password on the sheet in the apartment and given in messages was incorrect by wrong number and a capital letter given instead of lower case.
I paid around $3,000 for this and couldn't sleep or rest due to dust and poor beds. If you have a big luggage don't choose this place, because it doesn't have elevator. We carried on our luggage to 4th floor. The building has so narrow stairs. Also there is NO air conditioner, especially some quests who are come to house in the summer should be careful 😄 it was terrible. The drain of the bathtub was clogged and the water was draining very slowly. So we texted owner but the problem didn't solve. However, the street is so good, everywhere is so close. You will enjoy in the street near all museum. Love this place. Everything you needed felt right at home very comfy great view with the gardens below and right in a great neighborhood and close to everything. Emplacement excellent. Je n’ai rien à dire. Le reste, effectivement, de l’entretien est nécessaire.
Entre les fenêtre ou à chaque ouverture / fermeture on se demande si ça ne va pas se casser entre nos mains, la télé (franchement) défectueuse et la baignoire bouché n’ayant pas été débouché à notre arrivé, il est difficile d’y trouver un appartement correspondant à ce que l’on a louer.
Les chambres cependant étaient correcte, si on met de côté le fait que l’armoire de l’une d’entre elle ne peux pas entièrement s’ouvrir.
Un autre point positif est la vue sur la cour, très belle, avec en plus certaines espèce d’oiseaux comme des perruches venant s’y installer.
Je recommanderai ce logement très bien placé, à ceux qui n’ont pas pour objectif de rester trop longtemps à l’intérieur.

Die Unterkunft war ein absoluter Traum. Sie war sehr sauber, wunderschön eingerichtet und die die Gastgeber waren super freundlich.
Dadurch, dass es eine private Wohnung ist war auch alles da, was man in seinem Urlaub so gebrauchen kann.
Vielen vielen Dank und gerne wieder.
Liebe Grüße
Solli und Lisa Helle, große wohunung mit viel platz :) Dana is absolutely phenomenal at communicating, she made it so simple too check in and stay.
The apartment was incredibly clean, and in a nice quiet neighborhood with great coffee nearby and quick access to central Amsterdam. The only complaint I have is that we didn’t stay longer! Dana’s place is beautiful and we had a wonderful time. The roof terrace was a real highlight. The flat is really cozy and homey, but still felt spacious. Thank you for having us!

The place is perfectly located just a short walk from the Derkinderstraat trolley station which made it so easy to go out exploring and stop back for lunch or a nap. It’s peaceful, clean, and was exactly what I wanted for this trip. Elias communicates very well but this is the best aspect of the accommodation. The place needs attention. Was a very nice place to stay, easy check in. A bit far from things but 5 minutes walk is a tram stop with most tourist locations at your fingertips. Had one issue with the electric door lock loosing battery and being locked out for 2hrs but it eventually taken care of. Elias’s apartment provided a very clean, comfortable and convenient stay in Amsterdam! We enjoyed our time there.
It was very easy to check in and the space had all the necessities for our stay. The bathroom was clean and spacious, the closet had ample space and the bed was comfortable. The building is well kept and very quiet. The location is conveniently located to the tram and it was very easy for us to get around the city! Rembrandtpark is gorgeous and so close by which was a treat.
The only thing to note is that is a very quiet area and there isn’t anywhere close by to pop down for a coffee or groceries. The space isn’t set up for cooking meals which may be an inconvenience for a longer stay. Just some things to consider! But all in all, we had a very comfortable stay! Had an amazing time at Elias’s he's a very kind and caring host as well as easygoing, the place is very neat and comfy also you get stroopwaffle do that's a very nice detail! Fine place My husband and I booked a trip to Amsterdam a bit last minute. This was one of the only places left within our budget and while it was still pricey, we loved having our own space a little outside the city center. The kitchenette was perfect for making one or two meals a day to save some money. We made easy meals with the two burner stove. There is an Albert Heijn around the corner with whatever snacks you want and the tram and metro stations are a close walk away making it easy to commute into the city center. I highly recommend staying here! Elias is responsive and proactive. the space is very comfortable. I recommend it Excellent Nice studio and great location

Isabelle is a super nice host.  Very easy to reach and always responds very quickly.  In the pictures the apartment looks a little bigger than it is but that is usually the case.  All in all we were satisfied.  Unfortunately we had to leave a little earlier than expected and so we were only there for 1 night instead of two. The stairs to the apartment are very steep and narrow Un très bon séjour chez Isabelle. L’appartement est très bien placé, distance à pieds des transports et le balcon est un plus! Nous aurions aimé trouver une télévision plus moderne mais cela ne nous a pas empêcher de profiter de notre week-end. Isabelle est à l’écoute et facilement joignable. Isabelle is a fantastic host. Communication was great, and location was amazing. The apartment was clean and we felt right at home. Highly recommend a stay with Isabelle when you are in Amsterdam! Isabelle‘s Apartment ist wunderbar gelegen (Shops, Restaurants, Bäckereien in der Nähe), super gemütlich und hat alles was man für einen kurzen Aufenthalt braucht. Zudem war das Bett echt bequem. Der Kontakt mit ihr war super freundlich und sie hat stets schnell geantwortet. Wir haben uns bei ihr sehr wohlgefühlt!! Beautiful flat in a really nice neighborhood, 30 minutes walk from city center but full of bars, restaurants and a really nice market. Metro very close by. I will definitely come back Isabelle’s sweet apartment in De Pijp has so much going for it. Good restaurants within walking distance, the Metro and Tram stops 2 blocks away, walking distance to lots of museums. Everything in the kitchen works well (I think I want to buy that coffee machine!), and we were grateful for the washing machine. Comfy bed, good shower in the bathroom with good water pressure. We recommend!

This apartment is wonderful. Amazing views of the water, walking distance to everything, tram stop just outside, and a great backyard balcony for privacy. Check in was accommodating and flexible - I would stay here again! Amazing location in the heart of the neighborhood. Quiet bedroom and super comfortable bed. Lots of sunlight and beautiful views from the fri t and back of the apartment. Kurt was welcoming and responsive. I can’t wait to come back. What a perfect apartment in a hip neighborhood with lots of natural light and views overlooking the canal in front and a deck overlooking a quiet garden in back. Just a 3 minute walk to the light rail/trolley and a 20-25 minute stroll to everything in downtown Amsterdam. Just one small flight of stairs to the apartment made for easy access everyday and the washer and dryer were great to have for our week+ stay. Kurt and Heleen ensured we were met at the apartment, got settled in and provided info on places to eat, shop, where the bank ATMs were, etc. A variety of restaurants and grocery stores were a short walk in either direction and we felt completely safe everywhere we went. We absolutely loved our stay and will definitely stay again when we return to Amsterdam. Absolutely loved staying here for our 6-day trip! The apartment was very tidy and comfortable. Kurt also provided very helpful instructions for the apartment and a great list of recommended restaurants and cafes. The location was ideal as it was in a quieter area but still walkable within 30 mins of all the things we wanted to do in Amsterdam. And we really enjoyed the restaurants and gelato shop that are within a 5 minute walk of the apartment. Bonus that the bed was very comfortable and Kurt provided a Nespresso machine! Thanks for a great stay! We had a great time during our stay at Kurt's place. It was in a great location and offered two outdoor spaces- the front balcony and the patio in the back off the kitchen. The apartment was centrally located for us and made it easy to navigate to all of our favorite places in the city. We did have some issues with the key/door lock, but Kurt responded to my messages quickly and provided us with another set of keys. Great host. We would stay again if we're back in Amsterdam. We loved staying here. Especially appreciated the neighborhood feel of the location and the view out over the canal. The stairway is indeed VERY steep and narrow, and the stair lighting at night could be better. The kitchen was loaded with everything we needed, but had no functioning microwave or over-the-stove lighting. And I never saw a smoke alarm anywhere in the building...
The location would have been even more ideal if the extensive roadwork on De Clercqstraat did not eliminate the closest tram stops. Fortunately, we are strong walkers, and enjoyed (unexpected) dry weather. The only real challenge was watching out for the constant swarm of bicyclists. We had a few near misses.
We would definitely recommend the Kurt's apartment and would stay here again ourselves. He made us feel very much at home. Kurts place is great as a jumping off point to explore the city! The tram stops are close and convenient. The neighborhood has everything you could want as well and is a short walk to tons of great options. We had a wonderful stay at Kurt’s place. The place was light, spacious and Kurt was a fantastic and responsive host. We would stay again. We enjoyed the canal view and really liked the local ambience and vibe. Kurt's place served as a home base for our trip to the Netherlands. It's very conveniently located to the tram station and within walking distance of many restaurants and attractions. The apartment has a balcony that faces the canals too!
Upon arrival, Kurt greeted us and provided clear instructions on how to access the apartment. He also provided local recommendations for us, of which we went to several.
I would definitely stay here again!

Fleurs place was absolutely stunning! She must be an interior designer, the finishes, the curation - stunning! This was a very nice apartment in a great location, near the Dappermarkt street market and the restaurants on Javastraat. There are a train station and tram and bus stops very close, so it is easy to go places.  There is a grocery store 3 short blocks away. It was very convenient for Science Park (University of Amsterdam) where I was visiting (about 10 minutes on a bicycle or 25 minutes on foot). I was there during a particularly hot week and the air-conditioning (not common in Amsterdam) was very helpful.  The only potential drawback is that you need to climb two flights of fairly steep stairs to get to the apartment, but this is typical for Amsterdam.  I had to contact the host, Fleur, a couple of times; one time something had to be fixed and the other time I just needed to know how to do something.  In both cases she was very responsive and the issues were resolved quickly. I had a great stay at Fleur’s place- The apartment was chic and beautifully decorated, with a cozy, welcoming feel. The location was perfect—close to everything but still peaceful. Communication was smooth and easy from start to finish.

Wonderful large apartment in a desirable location downtown. Easily accessible to tram, restaurants etc. nice backyard. It is the owners unit, so there is a fair amount of clutter as a lived-in apartment.
Hosts were friendly and responsive. Perfect stay for our family of four with two young children. Peaceful street and quiet apartment. Very convenient walk to all the city attractions. Host was responsive and made the stay with our children a breeze and feel like home. The backyard garden was bigger than expected and a wonderful amenity for our stay. You couldn’t ask for a better location! This was our home base for our family (with two little kids) for 10 days and we had a lovely stay. The large garden is delightful. The house is very much a full time home, so more clutter and wear than we expected from the photos. Anouk was super friendly and easy to get in touch with. Tolle Wohnung und tolle Gastgeberin! Superzentrale Lage! Appartement très agréable et jardin super pour les enfants If Anouk’s flat has availability, do NOT pass it up! As a family traveling from the United States with small children, everything about this place was perfect!!! Close to EVERYTHING!!! The location was unreal! We went to museums, shops, playgrounds! Anouk was the BEST host! She greeted us and gave us a tour for check-in and was available for every little request we had along the way! Don’t pass this place up! Nothing compares! Excellent place for a family. Close to everything, but on a quiet street with a lovely backyard with a treehouse. Absolutely lovely home, if it's available you need to book it! The location is unbeatable and the home is so special. We love their aesthetic. It's a real home and we felt very fortunate to stay there. We traveled with 3 young kids, ages 5,7 and 9 months and we were all very comfortable! The hosts were super responsive and went the extra mile to make sure we were comfortable. We hope to return next year! Anouk’s home is a gorgeous, historic house. It worked great for our trip to Amsterdam to walk from the middle of town to everything! We enjoyed staying in a real historic Dutch home with a relaxed environment. Anouk was helpful and flexible and the back garden was a magnificent amount of space and super for a family. We had a lovely time! Very nice house with really great check in experience with Anouk and her husband . The garden is a hidden gem. Highly recommended!

This stay was truly a gem!
From the moment we walked in, it was clear that a lot of care and attention to detail had gone into the space. Everything was fresh with a sleek finish that immediately made us feel comfortable. The cozy decor created such a warm atmosphere, and we felt at home right away. Beds were incredibly comfortable, which was a real treat after a day of exploring the city.
About the location, this couldn't have been better, de Pijp is a lively neighbourhood with tons of charming cafes and spots to check out, and the apartment is just a short walk from all the major attractions.
What made our stay even more convenient was the fully equipped kitchen that had everything we needed.
Communication with Steven was excellent, he made us feel very welcome. We truly felt like we were living among the locals in a warm, well-maintained apartment in the heart of such a lively part of Amsterdam. We had a wonderful time and will definitely return. Highly recommended! I had a great stay at Steven’s flat! It’s in an awesome location, a few rings out of the city center so a little less touristy. It’s within walking distance of the metro, grocery stores and tons of bars and restaurants.
The flat was huge for Amsterdam, clean and had a well-stocked kitchen. There was even beer in the fridge. Steven asked what time I would arrive in Amsterdam and was quick to offer check-in early in as soon as I landed. When I walked in, it was New Years Eve and there was a bottle of champagne and chocolate waiting. It was also decorated for the holidays. The night before I checked out, Steven also messaged me offering late check-out.
I highly recommend Steven's Airbnb and I wish I would've found it on previous trips! What’s an amazing place and welcome pack:-)Thank you for bottles of wine, chocolate and fresh flowers with the greetings card. We cannot more recommended Steven’s place. Cosy atmosphere, beautiful decor and extremely quiet at day and night, off the main road. Walkable distance to main point of attractions and a good hub for public transport to the airport and central station. The place was extremely clean, and all appliances work well. Very comfortable bed :-). We highly recommended Steven’s appartment and him as a host. Kat and Irena We enjoyed a great stay at Steven's place. Great location right next to the tram stop, comfortable accommodation and all the amenities we needed to feel right at home.
Steven was also very responsive with his communications and added some nice touches to make us feel welcome. Can recommend and would stay there again. I have no hesitation in recommending this apartment which is in a very interesting part of town. It's quiet at night and has a really nice neighbourhood feel to it. It's easy to reach from the airport via train to Amsterdam RAI station and then Tram 4 from there to Ceintuurbaan which is 3 minutes walk from the apartment.
It's a very stylish apartment, with comfortable furniture and plenty of wardrobe space. The hosts had left things like chocolate, wine, beer, fruit and a hand-written personalised note which made us feel welcome and was appreciated. Communication with the hosts was excellent and they gave us some tips for restaurants / bars. I can confirm that most of the main attractions are within easy walking distance. There are many really nice cafe / bakeries nearby which are great for breakfast.
The bathroom is extremely tiny and a larger person may find it a bit of a squeeze......
I'm glad we chose this apartment for our Amsterdam break and would certainly return. Steven’s apartment is in a great location close to the tram. Located in a peaceful neighborhood, the apartment is perfect for a couple. The extra touches and treats provided were greatly appreciated and made our stay that much more enjoyable! Thank you for a wonderful stay in Amsterdam. I highly recommend Steven’s apartment! wonderful place to stay, highly recommend Lovely small apartment in a quiet street very close to a main road with regular trams.
Very nice, clean and well equiped place with a very comfortable bed.

Berend was responsive throughout the booking process. Always happy to help and amend to our timings where possible (late checkin and storing our bags). The property is beautiful and very thoughtfully equiped. Perfectly located for us to explore the city and extremely comfortable to rest between long days of walking, biking, shopping, eating and soaking up the sites. Would highly recommend Berend and his apartment, and would very much choose to stay again if the opportunity arrises.

Amazing stay and a an amazing host who made us feel well looked after, the property was perfect would definitely recommend and stay again !!!😁👏 Perfect Home in Amsterdam, My first trip there was so easy because of Jennifer and her home, it’s truly a home away from home with several spaces for you to enjoy. Relaxing in the Garden or Eating at the Dinner-table.
The home has a wonderful charm as well so if you are into Interior design and its utility this place is perfect and there is a coffee shop SUPER close with lovely pastries…
Utterly Perfect

Rosa's spot was beautiful. Great design and furniture, nice outdoor space, huge bathroom, beautiful kitchen. Would definitely stay here again. We had a wonderful time staying at Rosa’s lovely home. It’s perfectly located - tucked away on a charming street filled with the sounds of children playing in the afternoons. It’s only steps away from great restaurants, bars, and gorgeous Vondelpark. Quick walk to city center. Rosa was incredibly responsive and helpful. Couldn’t have asked for a better experience! Rosa’s place is perfect for a visit to Amsterdam! You are walking distance to both Vondelpark and many bars/restaurants. You are surrounded by locals making this feel like a unique way to experience the city. The only downside is that the bedroom is downstairs and you need to walk up stairs to use the restroom in the night. Other than that, this is a perfect place and we are sad to leave. Highly recommend this place. Spacious flat - even has a garden. Spotlessly clean and very well equipped, particularly the kitchen. Smart Tv, washer and dryer. Would definitely recommend and would stay again. Oud West is a great neighbourhood. One block to the Vondelpark and some excellent restaurants in the surrounding streets - particularly nice in the summer as they have pleasant terraces, which are less prevalent in the centre. A very pleasant quartier to stay in. Location is amazing - right by vondel park, bike rentals, trams. Really nice kitchen. Great little garden/porch Rosa was extremely accommodating! The place was really clean and had a well equipped kitchen. Clear instructions throughout and the check in / out process. The apartment itself was in a cool location and close to so much. Thank you Rosa! Looking forward to coming back to Amsterdam :) Un lugar hermoso en una zona muy familiar.
El apartamento cuenta con una cocina súper completa, mucha luz natural.
A pocos pasos del parque y del centro.
Rosa es una excelente anfitriona que siempre estuvo pendiente a todos los detalles, volveremos sin dudarlo. We loved our stay in Amsterdam and felt like Rosa’s apartment was the perfect location. We appreciated all the accommodations at the place and recommendations for us!

- Check In und Check Out waren sehr unkompliziert, die Kommunikation seitens Numa vorbildlich, sie waren jederzeit hilfsbereit und sehr schnell. Das Appartment 2 ist im Souterrain, ein paar Treppen rauf, dann ein paar Treppen runter, PIN eingeben (statt Schlüssel) und schon waren wir drin. Das Appartment macht einen gepflegten Eindruck, die Küche ist mit den nötigsten Utensilien ausgestattet, Kaffee und Tee sind vorhanden, sie ist funktional und modern. Die Geschirrspülmaschine funktionierte während unseres Aufenthalts nicht, was kein großes Drama war, da es nicht sooo viel abzuwaschen gab ;-)
Das Bad ist hübsch und gut ausgestattet.
Die beiden Schlafzimmer sind auch hübsch anzusehen, das eine (Queensize-Bett) hat ein großes Fenster zum Innenhof, das zweite (mit zwei Einzelbetten) hat leider kein Fenster. Die Matratzen sind gut für alle, die gerne weich liegen. Straßenbahnhaltestelle ist quasi vor der Tür und doch ist es schön ruhig 😊! Alles in Allem: Absolut empfehlenswert!!! Numa Amsterdam was a good place to stay. But much like many places in Amsterdam, there are some steep stairs leading from the street and into the apartment. That is ok if you are able bodied, but the elderly or those with mobility issues may struggle with luggage. Also, the bathroom gets quite wet when someone has a shower, but this could be easily fixed with the addition of a curtain or a different screen. Overall a good place to stay. Good location and very easy to find, however when we arrived the whole appartment had not been cleaned very thoroughly (spots/stains on the floor, spiders and webs not cleaned, shower flooding part of the bathroom) . For the price it still is a decently good deal and these issues can be dealt with without a lot of trouble. excellent location, I felt very comfortable close to restaurants and terraces, I will definitely come back and I recommend it from the bottom of my heart, I wish you all the best and success in everything!♥️ Nice place Apartment was clean and as described would definitely stay again. good location, had a minor issue that was resolved in a good manner, so all in all good value The host cancelled on the morning we were due to arrive with our two children. They left us no choice but to take a different apartment in the same building. The apartment we chose had air-conditioning and reviews that it was quiet. The apartment they forced us to take with no notice had no air-con & the kids bedroom had a door directly onto the street. We had to change rooms with the kids because no one could sleep in that room, one night people were screaming and fighting by the door until early in the morning.
The apartment was dirty. There was a horrible smell of damp from the bathroom that filled the bedrooms. They ignored our wifi problems, replying to us after we left three days later! There were no plates or crockery when we arrived, it took them 24 hours to resolve.
They would ignore Airbnb rules and advice about only communicating in Airbnb and insisted on only talking via 'Whats app' during our stay. Their 'whats app' had a broken bot that responded some of the time. Great location, easy to check in and out, nice place to stay for a few days.

We had a very pleasant stay! The location is perfect, not too busy but close enough to cafes and restaurants. City centre easily accessible by public transport. Both bus and trams are very close . Hugo was a very attentive host , will definitely recommend to others :) GREAT LOCATION
GREAT COMMUNICATION
GREAT HOST
GREAT APARTMENT
VERY COSY... I would recommend to anyone to stay at this location. Great apartment. Super clean and well equipped. Nice location. Hugo was a great host . So easy to communicate. Very helpful. I surely recommend this place We had such a great time at this beautiful apartment! Hugo was the most considerate host, there for all our questions including recommendations for the city, which we enjoyed a lot. The apartment is stylish, clean and we found the atmosphere to be very calming and relaxing. The city is easily explorable by bike, which Hugo is nice enough to have lent to us. On your way to the city you walk or bike through the gorgeous Vondelpark, such a joy every time :D The location is perfect if you want to enjoy the city but want to be able to retreat to a quiet comfy place in between your adventures. We had some very happy days there, our best airbnb experience so far and will definitely be back if Hugo will have us as his guests again :)) When looking for accommodation for a trip, it is important to look at whether it is close to the airport or to the destination. It cuts down on the time you spend on the move. I was satisfied that this accommodation I stayed was close to the airport and close to the travel destination.
And the cleanliness of the house was very neat. When I needed something, I told the host, and he prepared it right away, and he introduced tourist attractions and delicious restaurants around the accommodation. Thanks to the kindness of the host, I was able to travel with a happy mind throughout the trip.If I ever travel to Amsterdam again, I want to stay here again. I really recommend👍👍👍👍👍 I loved everything about my stay! The apartment was very clean, had great amenities and was in a good location to walk and/or catch the tram to the city center. With lots of eating options around the vicinity if you don’t feel like traveling the 15 minutes to the city center
One of my many favorite features was definitely the heated floors. Followed by the speakers. Such a great way to create a nice vibe in the house, when you’re lounging by the fireplace.
Hugo was easy to communicate with and very accommodating. He was very helpful and went out of his way to make sure I had everything I needed. I definitely felt very much at home and would recommend anyone to stay at this lovey apartment. Wow. What can I say about Hugo, this place, and HIS HOSPITALITY.
There is so much love and detail in crafting his apartment, from the huge closets to the beautiful plants and backyard. The apartment truly had such a zen and luxurious feel, it was incredibly spacious and accessible to Centraal. It only takes 20 minutes to get downtown with a bike, nearly half is spent through one of the best parks in Amsterdam (Vondelpark).
Hugo was incredibly generous and put in so much effort to make us feel at home. He provided us with local recommendations, where to rent a bike from and how to lock it up, how to use the washing machine (it has instructions written in Dutch which we couldn't understand ourselves), and he was incredibly responsive.
I've used Airbnb a lot in the past 10 years and this was easily the best experience I've had with a host. I look back at my 7-day stay in Amsterdam and honestly remember Hugo more of a friend than a host. We had a super week at Hugo's Place! It was a wonderful space to have as a home base as we met up with friends, did work, and took in some tourist sites too! Hugo was super helpful with instructions and checking with us mid-stay ( via text message) to be sure we had all that we needed. We had such a great time ! The location was perfect—close to everything but still quiet. Hugo was very welcoming and made us feel at home. The view from the window was so peaceful and made raining days so special. We highly recommend this place for a stay! 🏡✨ Hugo was absolutely the very best host! Before I got there he asked if there was any food or drink we needed. When I told him I was coming from the US to do a Thanksgiving meal for my son and friends, he ordered me a turkey from the butcher and even bought me a pie pan for pumpkin pie. He was so helpful in that way all throughout our stay and responded to every text. The TV wasn’t working and bam, he sent a chrome cast the next day. He was so kind to us from start to finish. If you will be entertaining while in town, this is your place. Beautiful kitchen with everything you could need. The apartment is renovated beautifully and was so cozy and felt like home. It’s close to everything and in the most beautiful setting. We had the very best time and will definitely be staying here again when I return. Truly the best Airbnb experience we’ve had. Thank you Hugo!!

L'appartement est très bien situé, dans un quartier calme, à proximité d'un magnifique parc, des commerces, bars, restaurants et des transports en commun... Idéal aussi pour ceux qui aiment marcher (à environ 1 heure du centre d'Amsterdam, voire moins) !
Jan est un hôte disponible et qui répond rapidement aux messages.
En ce qui concerne l'appartement en lui-même, il est fonctionnel et dispose de l'essentiel. Idéal pour un séjour à Amsterdam! Very nice, big place in a good location. I really enjoyed it!
The flat is equipped with everything needed, inc. every imaginable kitchen tool,
extra linen and even food...

This home is not ideal for

My wife and I absolutely loved Sander’s place!! We felt right at home for the week we were there. My wife and I had a slight issue connection our phones to the apartments’ electrical system, yet Sander was fantastic with helping us sort the issue, very quick and responsive with what we needed to do and how to fix the problem!! Lloyd & Lauren Its always worth a Trip.

I had a great stay, everything was just as described. Petite maison très agréable en pleine nature à 20 min du centre en tram
Le logement est situé sur un île artificielle qui présente des maisons à architecture très originale. Il est donc en bordure d'eau et cela est très agréable.
Le quartier est familial et sans bruit donc on y dort parfaitement bien
Vraiment rien de négatif à dire 😁 Die Anreise war ungemein entspannt. Die nähe zur Tramstation ( ca. 8-10 Minuten zu Fuß) macht es auch ohne eigenes Transportmittel problem- und stressfrei das Haus zu erreichen.
Es gibt tolle Einkaufsmöglichkeiten in der Nähe ( Metzgerei, Fischhändler, Bioläden) die man entweder zu Fuß oder bei größeren Besorgungen auch mit der Tram erreichen kann. Das alles ist nur eine Haltestelle entfernt.
Es bietet sich an bei der Ankunft direkt eine OV Karte zu besorgen, da man in nur 4 Stops direkt im Zentrum von Amsterdam ankommt.
Die Umgebung bietet von Restaurants, schönen Parkanlagen und einem nahe gelegenen Strand alles was das Herz begehrt.
Korien versorgte und bei unserem Aufenthalt noch mit etlichen Tipps für unsere Erkundungstouren.
Wir freuen uns schon auf das nächste mal. Die Lage der Unterkunft war sehr gut mit schnellem Zugang zur Straßenbahn Rigtig god beliggenhed, hvis man som os fortrækker ro, men samtidig nærhed til offentlig transport og bymidten.
Køkkenet er lidt spartansk udstyret. Kun få vinduer kan åbnes i hele huset. Had a great stay and felt right at home great location, comfortable space, nice if you want to cook at home and feel what it is to leave in Amsterdam. tram closed by. I recommend. Great house in a quiet and connected area. Location was very convenient to tram line. Peaceful, scenic spot. Downside there was no kettle, shampoo, conditioner or shower gel. There’s one double bedroom and the wardrobe is full of clothes with no hangers or space to hang yours. No work from home space and bed linen was excessively wrinkled and should have been ironed. I had to request twice the code for the lockbox even though it was within 24 hours of arrival. Because we only stayed a weekend it didn’t take away from our stay but a little bit of care could improve things. Good location, quiet family flat. Tram 26 goes directly to the center.
The only thing that could be improved is the fact the bedrooms dont have proper blinds so you have light quite early un the bedrooms so u tend to wake up early.

Traumhafter Aufenthalt, nette Gastgeberin, gut geschlafen..gerne wieder Wir waren zu zweit für drei Nächte im unterem Bereich des Hausbootes. Die Kommunikation war unkompliziert und wir würden bei der Ankunft nett begrüßt und alles nötige erklärt. Kleine Nachfragen und Hinweise wurden schnell beantwortet und bei Bedarf geholfen.
Es ist zwar klein, aber sehr gemütlich, modern und hell eingerichtet, die Gegend ist ruhig und entspannt und der Park nicht weit. Mit dem Rad ist man sehr schnell im Zentrum, das hat uns auch sehr gefallen :)
Vielen Dank für den Aufenthalt bei euch und liebe Grüße. Séjour correct dans cette petite chambre en sous-sol mais pas de sensation de péniche comme espéré. Les fenêtres en longueur en haut du mur apportent de la lumière et donnent effectivement sur un canal mais mur en béton en vis à vis. Chambre propre et mignonne mais pas d'endroit où poser ou accrocher un vêtement ou une serviette. Le lavabo est à l'exterieur de la salle d'eau (toute petite avec douche et WC en face) et sert aussi d'évier.
Je n'ai pas aimé le quartier : trop résidentiel et on ne croisait pas grand monde sur le quai ou dans les rues adjacentes. Etant peureuse, je n'ai pas osé rentrer après 21h avec ma fille. Mais c'est très personnel, il n'y avait rien de mal objectivement.
Un peu trop cher pour les prestations proposées mais c'est sans doute le cas de tous les logements à Amsterdam à cette période (été). I can't recommend this place highly enough. Doet is a wonderful host who has literally thought of everything...from the really easy to follow instruction video for getting in to the small thoughtful touches like eye makeup remover and cotton pads beside the sink. She is also highly responsive and takes care to make sure you have everything you need and that your questions are answered.
The room was light, immaculate and very comfortable. The decor was really tasteful. The location was perfect.
I will definitely stay here again. Le logement est idéalement situé dans un joli quartier calme proche du centre à pied, à vélo ou en transport en commun.
Doet et sa famille sont très accueillant et on pu répondre à nos interrogations. Location tranquilla. Spazio adatto e piacevole. Ottima pulizia e cura dei dettagli. Fantastic stay, clean room and great hosts! Alltid snabba svar, fint boende och bra område. Nära till allt. The room was clean and well equipped. The stairs were too tiny and steep. Not an issue for us but could be an issue for people with mobility issues. Ruud’s place is exactly what Airbnb was designed to be — a stay with a friendly host, able to give recommendations, in a unique “local” space.

The stairs are certainly steep and there are a lot but it was really part of the experience of Amsterdam. Dropping larger luggage at a storage facility and only bringing a small bag is a must.

The balcony is spacious, and you have your own personal space. The restroom is particularly clean and well-maintained. The hosts are very kind and offer unlimited towels, toilet paper, and water. Thank you so much for a lovely stay and I hope to return next year!

Thank you, Helene! Great hospitality and cozy amazing house. Thanks Helene! Every room was gorgeous. I stayed with my sister and my mum and we enjoyed the space so much. The location is a perfect place to explore the city. Only 20 minutes from the station and 15 minutes from Jordaan. We spent a lot of time at the local cafe/bar Mads. Helene was responsive and flexible. I would defo come back and recommend to a friend Just north of the main Jordaan area, Helene’s home was a great base for us to explore Amsterdam. The loft is beautiful and filled with light, and the king bed was comfortable. There’s a few restaurants and bars within a few blocks, and more appear as you walk south 5-10 min. Centraal Station was also very close via car.
The stairs for this 3rd story walk-up were very narrow so that was a bit difficult. The shower water pressure also wasn’t the best.
All in all, I’d recommend Helene’s home! She was a wonderful host to us. This is the perfect place to stay while in Amsterdam! First of all, it is a stunning apartment. It was very easy to walk or get public transit to nearby places, and there are many restaurants within walking distance. It’s so beautifully decorated and the little balcony was so handy to enjoy sunny days. The flat is perfectly located in a quieter part of Amsterdam but at the same time you’re within a walking distance to all amenities, supermarkets etc. Helene was such a wonderful host❤️ She let us check in earlier, was so attentive and friendly.
Thank you for everything, highly recommended!💕 Very nice flat.
Close to the old city, train station and public transport. Ideal, to explore Amsterdam on your own by walking.
Helen is a wonderful host, taking care on you.

Der Aufenthalt auf einem Hausboot ist absolut zu empfehlen. Wir konnten morgens im Freien unseren Kaffee trinken und auch abends gemütlich außen sitzen und aufs Wasser schauen. Das Boot war innen sauber, nett eingerichtet und Xanthe, die auch auf dem Boot lebt, hat sehr schnell reagiert, als uns etwas fehlte.
Nun zu den nicht so schönen Punkten. Als wir um 14:05 Uhr ankamen war der Schlüssel bereits im Schlüsselfrage und keine Putzfrau mehr zu sehen, daher haben wir es gewagt, schon vor dem eigentlichen Check in um 15 Uhr einzuziehen. Kurz darauf stand Xanthe vor der Türe und wir wurden zur Rede gestellt. Diese Begrüssung war unschön und wir konnten das Problem nicht wirklich nachvollziehen.
Da es sehr warme Tage waren, war es in den Schlafräumen leider fürchterlich stickig und durch das kleine Bullauge kam kaum frische Luft.
Der Außenbereich war schmutzig, das Tor zum Boot kaputt, verdorrte Blumen,….hier sollte der Eigentümer auch mal selbst vor Ort sein. My family and I loved staying on the house boat. Walking distance to everything we wanted to do and see. We would definitely stay here again. Sehr nette und saubere Unterkunft mit sehr guter Lage und sehr freundlichen Gastgeber Das Hausboot hat eine top Lage.

Sehr modern und praktisch eingerichtet ,alles vorhanden,Geschirrspüler
,Kaffeemaschine etc.

War ein Erlebnis,weiterempfehlen wir gerne weiter. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay on Paul's houseboat. We were 3 adults (me and my husband and our adult daughter). The houseboat's location in the center of the city meant that many museums and restaurants were within a walkable distance. But what was really special was sitting out on the houseboat deck observing life along the Amstel Canal.
The houseboat itself was comfortable. With its 2 bedrooms it was a great way for the 3 of us to spend time together in a floating home of our own. The only real challenge were the steep steps going from the upper level into the living area. There was no railing on one side which was a bit of a challenge. Otherwise, it was a fun place to stay! Great experience to stay on a boat house in the middle of Amsterdam. Wonderful host, great location and very clean.
However, very tight for four people with lots of luggage. We were lucky that our friends cancelled so it was okay for a couple. Also, price is quite high vs hotels in the area. We loved the house boat on the Amster canal. Perfect location close to everything. Served by Uber - uber would come within minutes. Plenty of restaurants and shops at walkable distance. The houseboat is unique. Well maintained and welcoming. Paul was kind and responsive. Plenty of towels and clean linens. Bring your own shampoo, shower gel and conditioner since they are not available. Wifi worked well. We truly loved our stay and we would highly recommend the houseboat. Brilliant experience staying on a houseboat - we loved sitting on the terrace with a glass of wine and watching all the boats go past.
Lots of great bars and restaurants within a short 5 minute walk Paul's place was wonderful. We spent endless hours on the patio watching boats pass by on the Amstel River. The scenery was amazing. It was super clean and the responsiveness to questions was very quick. We were in town during a major festival for Amsterdam, and while it got a little noisy at night on occasion, we knew what we signed up for. The city had a lot to celebrate! It was great for our little family of three and could easily do for a family of four. I would suggest no little kids though as the boat patio was very open. Great stay and we would happily stay again! Great experience staying in a canal boat and easy to get around.
Loved watching the boats go up and down in the afternoon and were lucky enough to see the end of the Tall ship festival.

Wir würden es als klein aber fein und super modern beschreiben und auf jeden Fall weiterempfehlen! Honestly? I am in AMS alot and regularly look for "smart deals" on 4 and 5-star hotels. Hope to stay with Lydia & Roelof again. :) Roelof and Lydia made sure we had the best stay possible. There is construction going on currently on their street but unless you are driving a car (and why would you in Amsterdam?) this caused no issues whatsoever. No noise from construction at night. They were great and friendly hosts and would book again happily! Lydia and Roelof’s beautiful private room was perfect! They were very eager to communicate for everything. The location was ideal. It was close to many restaurants, museums, and metro/tram stops. The De Pijp district where this is located was my favorite part of Amsterdam and this room is exactly what you need for all of your Amsterdam needs. Will definitely book again! Meget central beliggenhed i meget hyggeligt kvarter tæt på alt. Værterne er meget gæstfrie, oplysende og hjælpsomme og havde skrevet personlig hilsen ved ankomst. rundum alles Super kann man nur weiterempfehlen The location was perfect — plenty of local restaurants, cafés, and shops, which made exploring the neighborhood really easy and enjoyable. The area felt lively and it was nice to be able to step outside and find great food or a cozy coffee spot.

Overall, it was a great experience, and I’d definitely stay here again when I return to Amsterdam!
